programme.desc: In Cocomelon, baby JJ and his siblings go on fun every-day adventures with nursery, play, exploration and learning - situations which any pre-schooler could relate to. Fun, relatable stories set to catchy songs.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Archipelagos
programme.desc: The romantic notion of island life has always attracted us. Explore the histories, cultures, and unique ways of life on the World’s Greatest Archipelagos - clusters of islands that share common bonds of geography, geology, and genealogy.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Arks
programme.desc: Cut off from continents, remote islands have become floating arks, attracting migrating species and forging new ones. Take a privileged glimpse into the secret lives of the rare and exotic species that inhabit these lost worlds.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Volcanic Islands
programme.desc: They've been worshiped and feared over the millennia. But in the wake of drama and destruction, the elements give rise to cultures and nations so beautiful that we've come to know them as the world's greatest volcanic islands.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Island Nations
programme.desc: Though many are small in stature, they have punched well above their weight on the global stage. Some are rooted in ancient history, while others are only just beginning to realize their full potential.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Nearshore Islands
programme.desc: Some of the world’s greatest islands are so close that they blend in with the mainland. But regardless of their size and origins, they are often the islands we are drawn to the most, each forging their own unique identity.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Coral Islands
programme.desc: The reef systems that gave rise to coral islands support the vast majority of marine species on our planet, but they are under threat. Explore the delicate balance between exploiting and preserving these extraordinary natural wonders.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Global Cities
programme.desc: Travel to the centers of wealth, power, industry, and innovation. From London to Tokyo, Hong Kong to New York, these are the cities that never sleep. The influence held in these economic hubs unites the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mega Cities
programme.desc: Mega Cities provide a bustling home to populations of over 10 million. Travel from the high-density living of Shanghai and Bangkok to the sprawling cities of Delhi and Mexico City, each the backdrop for dynamic cultures.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW!
programme.desc: Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur: Do You Speak George?/World Girls
programme.desc: Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Arthur: What's Cooking?/Buster's Special Delivery
programme.desc: Celebrity chef Ming Tsai is judging Lakewood Elementary's first-ever cooking contest, and Arthur thinks he has a shot at winning. Then, Buster volunteers to deliver the school mail and finds out that his new job is actually hard work!

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In
programme.desc: Vicita Molina has lost her favorite bedtime book – can Arthur help her re-create it? Prunella is already starting to think about college! Will she crack under the heavy load or will she learn to relax and do the things she actually enjoys?
programme.sub-title: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In

programme.title: Arthur: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret
programme.desc: When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Arthur: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train
programme.desc: Nadine, D.W.'s imaginary friend is missing. Sue Ellen can't wait to travel on an old-fashioned train, but once onboard, she discovers that the train is not as spectacular as she had hoped–until she finds a mysterious diary.
programme.sub-title: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Hic or Treat/Mr. Alwaysright
programme.desc: D.W. gets a case of the hiccups that just won't go away. Will she have them for the rest of her life and set the world record? It seems that Brain is always right about everything and it's really starting to get on Buster's nerves.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Pilfered Paper/Buster Gets Real
programme.desc: When Francine has a big paper over Thanksgiving, she copies from a website. There's nothing wrong with that, is there? Everyone loves the new Top Supermarket reality series on TV, except Arthur. Will it end his friendship with Buster?

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. on Ice/Spoiled Rotten!
programme.desc: D.W. tells her friends that she's a fantastic skater, but she can barely stand on ice! With a skating party coming up, how will she face everyone and tell them the truth? Accused of being spoiled, Muffy sets out to prove her friends wrong.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Brother Binky, Parts I&II
programme.desc: Binky's family has decided to adopt a little girl from China. The thought of a baby sister makes Binky happy, until he realized there are some changes in store. It’s a lot harder than he thought, but it has its rewards too.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Lucille & Kidd Cole
programme.desc: Lucille led a simple life until she was asked to work for music producer Kidd Cole. Companies were never paid and one day Kidd couldn't be found. Will she get the answers she needs?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Tracie & Sammie
programme.desc: Tracie Thoms had a connection with a fan named 'Sammie' after hearing about the passing of Sammie's friend. Sammie suddenly disappeared and now Tracie is left wondering who Sammie really is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: John & Kelsey
programme.desc: John is ready to leave Detroit but one thing holds him back: Kelsey. The two have never spoken outside of online chats but John is sure she's the one. Can he include Kelsey in his plans?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Bianca & Brogan
programme.desc: When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Long Island Serial Killer
programme.desc: A report on the disappearance of Shannan Gilbert, near Gilgo Beach, New York. The search for Shannan led to the discovery of a total of ten bodies in the scrub brush of Gilgo Beach, leading police to suspect the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: Hunting Humans
programme.desc: In July 2007, Shea McDonough returned home and left the back door open for her brother, not knowing he wasn’t coming home for the night. Hours later, when her father went to her room to check on her, he saw a masked man standing over her with a knife.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Every Picture Tells A Story
programme.desc: On February 15, 2009, Cathy McNaughton was stabbed to death in her home in Sharpsburg, Georgia. The day had started with her husband Alec serving her breakfast in bed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Death Wish
programme.desc: A report surrounding the July 2009 death of Jeffrey Locker, whose body was found slumped over the steering wheel of his car in Harlem, New York. When authorities tracked Locker’s ATM card to Kenneth Minor, Minor said Locker had begged Minor to kill him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sweetheart Murders
programme.desc: The story of sweethearts Sabrina Gonsalves and John Riggins who were brutally murdered in Davis, California, in 1980. Initially, police suspected Gerald Gallego, but he was in jail at the time of the murders.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Year We Disappeared
programme.desc: In August 1979, John Busby, a Falmouth, Massachusetts police officer, was ambushed in his car by a gunman in a passing car who shot him in the face. Although wounded, Busby was able to write a note for police at the scene that said “Not an accident.”

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Stranger You Know
programme.desc: A report about Marti Hill, who was savagely beaten in her Prairie Village, Kansas home. She was found by police barely breathing and covered in blood.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Over the Edge
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2009 disappearance of Dawn Viens, and why her husband, California chef David Viens, jumped off a cliff when he became a suspect in her disappearance.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Pete's Christmas
programme.desc: A put-upon teen finds himself reliving the same miserable Christmas day over and over again. Starring: Bruce Dern, Zachary Gordon, Molly Parker, Rick Roberts, Marshall Williams.

programme.title: The Christmas Consultant
programme.desc: This Lifetime Original Movie stars David Hasselhoff as a sought after consultant hired by a workaholic mother (Caroline Rhea) in an effort to get her and her family through the holidays.

programme.title: You Can’t Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Matchmaker Santa
programme.desc: As a little girl, Melanie Hogan (Lacey Chabert) wished to find her own Prince Charming, just like her parents found true love.

programme.title: Best Christmas Party Ever
programme.desc: Jennie Stanton (Torrey DeVitto) throws the best Christmas parties every year for her company, Petra's Parties.

programme.title: Sarah's House: Family Room
programme.desc: Sarah breaks down the walls of this nowhere space to make a family room that serves a multitude of purposes. While the design scheme skews male, it’s meant to welcome all with comfort and style...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Living Room, Front Entry
programme.desc: This is purely a case of making the most of what you’ve got. Sarah unites a dated living room and entryway, giving them modern appeal and flexibility. A sense of drama comes via a heightened doorway and new set of stairs...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kitchen + Dining Room
programme.desc: One of the costliest renovation challenges in any house is the kitchen. Sarah bucks this trend with stylish, customized ready-made cabinetry and useful solutions for absolutely everything...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Curb Appeal
programme.desc: Nothing makes a better calling card than curb appeal. It’s also one of the most expensive home renovation projects to undertake. Sarah modernizes the house’s exterior by replacing a tangle of trees...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Grand Finale
programme.desc: How far have Sarah’s imagination, limited budget and sheer determination taken her? On buying the house, Sarah’s real estate agent strongly advised she be penny-wise, and spend no more than $170,000 on the entire renovation...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Entry & Mudroom
programme.desc: Sarah buys a farm within commuting distance of a major city to get more space for the money and prove you can get the home of your dreams right now...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Main Bedrooms
programme.desc: Living outside of a major city can mean unexpected sleepovers. Sarah transforms the farmhouse’s two original bedrooms into distinctive and welcoming quarters that also work for impromptu guests...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Main Bath
programme.desc: It’s a lesson on maximizing style on a minimal budget. Sarah and Tommy modernize a tired bathroom with new fixed elements like flooring, fixtures and standalone shower...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kitchen
programme.desc: Creating a cook’s kitchen from a hodge podge of smaller rooms. Sarah faces confusing flow, uneven floors and low hung windows to make this space the home’s epicentre...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Dining Room
programme.desc: A wide connecting hall bridging the original house and new addition becomes the hub for family dining...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Living Room
programme.desc: Sarah and Tommy design a living room from the ground up. Their main objective is to connect this new-build space to the original farmhouse through the use of paint and wallpaper...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kids' Bedrooms
programme.desc: It’s girls versus boys as Sarah and Tommy each take a child’s bedroom from studs to wonderful...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Family Bath
programme.desc: This one bathroom must service a master bedroom and two kids’ rooms. Sarah’s brief in this brand new space includes a spacious shower and decadently deep tub...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Master Bedroom
programme.desc: A bold, antique market quilt forms the basis for this bright, wake-me-up space. Sarah and Tommy use it as inspiration for everything from fabric right down to the paint colour for resale shop bedside lamps...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Exterior/finale
programme.desc: After seeing how the farm’s exterior has come together, Sarah finally learns how much value her hard work has added to the once modest farmhouse...

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley takes an anniversary trip with her boyfriend. Leah receives life altering news about her health. Kail says goodbye to her old house and bittersweet memories. (S10, ep22)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley gives Bar an answer. Luis asks to see Stella for the first time in months, forcing Bri to decide what is truly best for her daughter. (S10, ep23)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Level Up
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, after a Covid exposure at the girls' school, Leah has to make some difficult decisions. Devoin lets Nova down and Briana must pick up the pieces. (S10, ep24)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Not Quite
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut Sean proposes, but Jade's not sure how to respond. Leah is forced into quarantine when Jeremy tests positive for covid. Briana introduces her man to the cameras. (S10, ep25)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Full Circle
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade decides to get plastic surgery in Miami, so Briana visits to coach her through her anxiety. Bar goes to court for his outstanding DUI charges. (S10, ep26)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: MIA
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade gets plastic surgery but her recovery turns dangerous. Ashley struggles when she finds out she has to move. Leah gets news that will help Ali be more independent. (S10, ep27)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Mutual Combat
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade's recovery gets even rockier when tensions rise between Sean and her parents. Ashley and Bar make a tough wedding decision as he faces another court date. (S10, ep28)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Bonded for Life
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade plans to fly home, but Briana tries to convince her to come back to Orlando instead. Kail reveals heartbreaking challenges around a recent medical diagnosis. (S10, ep29)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cut Out
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a decision about her family. Kail juggles three different co-parenting relationships. (S10, ep30)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Jordan and her sister were models and best friends until Jordan's pregnancy put all that on hold. Now her boyfriend and her sister are competing to be her number one.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jennifer
programme.desc: After abandoning sports and losing her friends, Jennifer has to battle with her over-protective parents to accept her boyfriend before she gives birth to twin boys.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jamie
programme.desc: Raised by a single mum, Jamie is a straight A student with big plans for the future. But after getting pregnant she struggles to mould her immature boyfriend into the father she never had.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Danielle
programme.desc: After following her mum's footsteps by becoming a teen mum, Danielle strives to prove she can do things differently. But she soon learns she needs help managing school, a job and a baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Cleondra
programme.desc: Regarded as the most likely to succeed in her family, Cleondra shocks everyone by getting pregnant so young. Now she faces the tough decision to leave home and move in with her boyfriend.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kayla
programme.desc: Kayla's anorexia comes back full-force when she is pregnant. While struggling to put looks aside, Kayla realizes that the person she has always relied on, her mother, refuses to support her.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Izabella
programme.desc: After hiding her pregnancy for eight months, Izabella is forced to reconsider who her true friends are. She then risks her family ties when her boyfriend betrays their trust.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kianna
programme.desc: With an immature boyfriend and a distant mum, Kianna wants more stability for her baby and considers adoption. When no one supports her decision, she must figure out how to be a good parent.

programme.title: Wild Animal Orphans: Signs in the Sand
programme.desc: In trying to find a leopard in the vast desert landscape of southern Namibia, Marlice relies on the skills of Kiewiet, an expert Bushman tracker.

programme.title: Class Rank
programme.desc: Starring Olivia Holt (Cloak & Dagger), Skyler Gisondon (Booksmart) and Bruce Dern (The Senator). Two high school outsiders join forces to overtake the local school board.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hamlet
programme.desc: A dour production of Shakespeare’s play produced for German TV. A prince returns home for his father’s funeral and doesn’t like what he finds.

programme.title: Wonder Women
programme.desc: A fiendish supervillain is kidnapping star jai alai players in order to harvest their organs! Even more shocking, someone pitched that plot to a Hollywood executive and they said Yes, we'll make that movie!

programme.title: Scaredy Squirrel: Shop Cop / Acting Silly
programme.desc: Scaredy has to spend the night guarding the store. / Scaredy has his first crush.

programme.title: Bangkok Fight Nights: Episode 2
programme.desc: Thousands flock to witness the incredible Muay Thai events put on by Bangkok Fight Night every week. The combination of the unique location, hard hitting action and curious onlookers make Bangkok Fight Night an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: K-1: Hercules '96
programme.desc: K-1 Hercules 1996 - Nagoya, Japan - Rainbow Hall. / K-1 World Grand Prix 2007 in Las Vegas - Las Vegas, NV - Bellagio

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Venice Grand Prix - Part 3
programme.desc: Six players compete in the storied city of Venice, Italy for more than $300,000 in the WPT Venice Grand Prix.

programme.title: Primetime Pets
programme.desc: Primetime Pets isn't your usual compilation of adorable animal videos. These sketches are educational aswell as hilarious - showing animals in their prime!

programme.title: FailFactory
programme.desc: Aerial anguish, baseball biffs, crazy cats, ditzy drivers and much, much more. The best themed internet fails, all in one place.

programme.title: Thinknoodles does Minecraft: GUESS WHO NEARLY BURNT THE SERVER DOWN?!!
programme.desc: #Thinknoodles goes Minecraft CRAZY!!
programme.sub-title: GUESS WHO NEARLY BURNT THE SERVER DOWN?!!

programme.title: IGN Walkthroughs: Zelda: Breath of the Wild (Pt. 2)
programme.desc: Welcome to IGN's The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild Walkthrough. This guide will seek to assist you through the shrines in Breath of the Wild. In this episode: the shrines of Centrale Hyrule, Faron, and Great Hyrule Forest.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: This episode includes: Padre Pio, Pts. 1 & 2, Model's Third Notebook & UD, Calculating Coroners & UD and Nazi's Lazarus.

programme.title: Total Divas
programme.desc: Nattie can't say no & ends up infuriating her husband, Nikke confronts Bryan over not liking her & Paige ditches Alicia for a new man.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Finland
programme.desc: In the land of lakes, forests and white nights, only one can be strongest. World strongest Viking and ‘The Mountain’ from Game of Thrones and Big Z - Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on Earth, compete for the title.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 31
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a toy car beat a Dodge Viper in a quarter-mile downhill race? Is yawning contagious? Does buttered toast always land buttered-side down?

programme.title: Fear Factor: Jet Ski/Bowling For Beetles/Traverse Building
programme.desc: Contestants will pull themselves into the belly of the helicopter. A number of pins left standing will represent the number of live beetles each contestant will have to eat. A contestant has to climb on a rope that is over a hundred feet in the air.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The World’s Strongest Team: Fire Version!
programme.desc: Mark and Shawn are joined in their reflecting by Axel, who has his own take on the crazy ups and downs of their long struggle against Alius Academy.
programme.sub-title: The World’s Strongest Team: Fire Version!

programme.title: Baroness Von Sketch Show
programme.desc: The all-female comedy series is created by and stars veteran Canadian actor Meredith MacNeill and Second City alumni Carolyn Taylor, Aurora Browne and Jennifer Whalen, who satirize modern life's everyday concerns.

programme.title: CarGO
programme.desc: A young car learns the importance of family when he embarks on a mission to rescue his father – who’s been sent to Clunker Island to be repurposed as junk metal.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Dungeons of Despair!
programme.desc: Ming throws Lynch in jail, but his replacement performs so well that Flash, Aura and Barin trick Ming getting Lynch back.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight it’s a Supersize Vs Superskinny first-a double swap! Cake-aholicsmother and daughter Janet and Tara Wells swap diets with too busy to eat Joanne Evans and KeithLinage.
programme.sub-title: Janet and Tara vs Joanne and Keith

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see what happens when a house in Wales, a property in Essex and a terraced house in Birkenhead go up for auction. We will be finding out who buys them and what they pay for them when they go Under The Hammer!

programme.title: Capricorn One
programme.desc: A NASA Mars mission won't work, and its funding is endangered, so they decide to fake it just this once. But then they have to keep the secret. Starring: Elliott Gould, James Brolin, Brenda Vaccaro, O.J. Simpson, Sam Waterston

programme.title: A is for Apple: Pork and Pineapple
programme.desc: Chef Leah Wildman’s pork and pineapple challenge brings about roast pork, caramelized pineapple polenta cake, and a fun dish using both ingredients.

programme.title: Hunter: Death Signs
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of the stabbing of a deaf man hinges on cryptic clues the victim gave in sign language before he died.

programme.title: Euronews Livestream
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim gives some advice on how to prevent car theft. Tom meets up for some mayhem in a Fiat Qubo with a touring Guns 'n' Roses tribute band.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: Cheddar News Live
programme.desc: Cheddar News Live

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Little Shop of Horrors - Three Riffer Edition: Little Shop of Horrors: Three Riffer Edition

programme.sub-title: The Calendar: How To Use It / Perc! Pop! Sprinkle!

programme.title: Fear Factor: Descender Jump/Eat Sheep's Eye/Water Tank
programme.desc: Contestant will hang from a bar placed outside a 12th story window and drop by a descender line. Each contestant will be asked to eat three sheep's eyes in three minutes. Each contestant is lowered by their feet head first into a water tank.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Dog Attack/Snake Pit/Beam Walk
programme.desc: Contestants will fire a starter's pistol and run from an attack dog. The contestants will lie in a pit made up of faux rocks and burlap... Oh, and snakes.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Semi Truck Jump/Meal Worm Pit/Reverse Bungee With Paint Ball
programme.desc: A contestant stands on top of a moving semi truck jump and leaps. Approximately 300,000 superworms will be placed into a case with the contestants. Each contestant will hold a paint ball gun and be harnessed to a reverse bungee line.
programme.sub-title: Semi Truck Jump/Meal Worm Pit/Reverse Bungee With Paint Ball

programme.title: Fear Factor: Eat Buffalo Testicles/Pendulum Swing-Human Wrecking Ball/Submerged Car
programme.desc: Each contestant will be asked to eat two boiled buffalo testicles in 4 minutes. Each contestant will be harnessed and raised by crane. Each contestant will sit in the front seat of a car as the car is lowered by crane into water.
programme.sub-title: Eat Buffalo Testicles/Pendulum Swing-Human Wrecking Ball/Submerged Car

programme.title: Fear Factor: Net Jump/Worm Cocktail/Tunnel Crawl
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a one hundred and ten foot tower. Each contestant will be asked to eat 6 worms in 4 minutes. Each contestant will have to find their way through an underground tunnel.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Submarine Dive/Cricket Eating/Slide For Life
programme.desc: Contestants swim under a boat collecting glow sticks along the way. Then a contestant will throw a dart, and the score they hit is the number of crickets they'll have to eat.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Power Pole/Pig Buffet/Traverse The Truck
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a 35 foot power pole, they must stand on top. Contestant will select a fortune cookie, each fortune is inscribed with a different pig part. The contestant stands on a skid at the back of a semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor: Jet Ski/Bowling For Beetles/Traverse Building
programme.desc: Contestants will pull themselves into the belly of the helicopter. A number of pins left standing will represent the number of live beetles each contestant will have to eat. A contestant has to climb on a rope that is over a hundred feet in the air.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Meltdown
programme.desc: As spring arrives and Ray's retirement day approaches, Sean surprises everyone by leaving Buffalo for a job with the competition. So Buffalo brings in Electra pilot Brian Harrison to finish the contract.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: North Atlantic Convoy
programme.desc: Greenland's Narsarsuaq airport - known as one the world's most dangerous approaches - looms on the horizon as Cory and Justin begin a trans-global journey to deliver two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey. Christine pushes to become a DC-3 co-pilot,

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Sunk
programme.desc: Joe and Mikey hire a helicopter for a salvage mission to retrieve the rare tailpiece from a Lockheed 10-A that crashed in the Yellowknife woods forty years ago. It's a personal quest for Joe; he flew that plane at the beginning of his career.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Turkey or Bust
programme.desc: Justin and Cory are stranded in Croatia while trying to complete the delivery of two CL-215 water bombers to Turkey. Metal rock band Iron Maiden's lead singer Bruce Dickinson flies Buffalo's DC-3 from Edmonton to Yellowknife.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Cold Start
programme.desc: Mikey links up with Chris Hadfield aboard the International Space Station. Problems mount while trying to get a frozen DC-4 airborne. A landing gear collapse on the runway sends the entire crew scrambling.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot David faces a remote Arctic airstrip with sketchy landing gear. Mikey drafts a Buffalo hockey team to face off against an NHL squad in a charity shootout. Chuck gets a chance to shine on the ice.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Snowplane
programme.desc: Joe races a quirky antique snowmobile - with an airplane engine and no brakes. The water bomber crew struggles to get two planes out of Turkey. Cocky rampie Chris Staples tries to prove himself in the C-46.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Gear Lock
programme.desc: A cold snap triggers massive challenges. Devan runs into gear problems while he ferries a mothballed DC-3 across the country. And Justin has to make a snap decision with his newborn son aboard his plane.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Fire Revival!
programme.desc: Unsurprisingly, Epsilon Prime are wiping the floor with Raimon Jr, but their spirits can't be broken. If they all pull together and work hard and have fun, they can beat these aliens and save their earth. Or can they?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Freezing Darkness of Diamond Dust!
programme.desc: The team are ecstatic - they’ve got Axel back and they’re heading home for some R and R. All is not well with Shawn Frost, but with some care and attention he should be back to full strength soon.
programme.sub-title: The Freezing Darkness of Diamond Dust!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Byron - The Back Up of the Gods
programme.desc: Well the team didn’t get their beef stew, it’s straight back to work and a big game against Diamond Dust - the master ranked team of Alius Academy.
programme.sub-title: Byron - The Back Up of the Gods

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: A New Challenge!
programme.desc: Mark’s been forced to quit his position as goalie, but the situation isn’t as bad as everyone feared - he’s just moving a little up the field and becoming a defender!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Mark Vs Axel!
programme.desc: Mark and the rest of the team make a visit to Royal Academy. For some it’s brings back bad memories, but for others it’s an opportunity to learn new moves and new tactics.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Miraculous Team!
programme.desc: Raimon have been practicing and hoping for more time to prepare for the inevitable alien assault, but before they know it they’re here, and stronger than ever.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Blizzard of Fire!
programme.desc: Diamond Dust and Prominence are pounding on Raimon with the full weight of their combined force, but Raimon have found a hole in their defenses and are managing to fight back.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Alius Academy Finally Arrives!
programme.desc: The secrets behind Alius Academy are beginning to bubble up to the surface and it looks like Coach Lina knows much more than she’s saying.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: Alius Academy Unveiled!
programme.desc: The veil of secrecy has finally been lifted and we know who Alius Academy is and who’s behind them. But the hard part still lies ahead - Mark and the Raimon 11 have to play the ultimate team of warriors, Genesis!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Final Battle - Part 1!
programme.desc: The final battle to end all final battles has begun. Raimon versus Genesis, and at the start they look totally outclassed. Unless Raimon can find some kind of secret weapon they’ll never beat the uber soldiers of Genesis.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Final Battle - Part 2!
programme.desc: The fate of the world rests on the outcome of the game being played at a stadium inside Mount Fuji.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Endless Threat!
programme.desc: The final battle is over, but as we all know there are final battles and then there are Final Battles! Which is this to be?

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Raimon Vs Raimon Face Off!
programme.desc: Just when you think you have the strongest soccer team in the entire universe, along comes another team waiting to prove you wrong. And so it is with the Raimon 11, only this time the team challenging them is…the Raimon 11!
programme.sub-title: The Raimon Vs Raimon Face Off!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The Ultimate Friendship Move!
programme.desc: The Dark Emperors are merciless and relentless and are giving Raimon a pounding like they’ve never had before.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The World’s Strongest Team: Blizzard Version!
programme.desc: The battles are over and the war has been won, but before the next surprise comes along, Shawn and Mark take a few minutes to reflect on all the battles they’ve been through and all their triumphs and defeats along their long road to victory.
programme.sub-title: The World’s Strongest Team: Blizzard Version!

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven: The World’s Strongest Team: Fire Version!
programme.desc: Mark and Shawn are joined in their reflecting by Axel, who has his own take on the crazy ups and downs of their long struggle against Alius Academy.
programme.sub-title: The World’s Strongest Team: Fire Version!

programme.title: Celebrity
programme.desc: The fortunes of a husband and wife differ drastically after they divorce. Starring: Kenneth Branagh, Judy Davis, Leonardo DiCaprio, Greg Mottola, Melanie Griffith, Douglas McGrath, Charlize Theron

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Ralph tries to save himself and a town from a rampaging motorcycle gang.

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: Classical Gas
programme.desc: Ralph and Pam help his students rehearse their rock band for a show, not realizing the promoter plans to release nerve gas into the audience.

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: The Beast in the Black
programme.desc: Will Ralph's suit protect Bill from a real estate agent — or his ghost?

programme.title: The Greatest American Hero: The Lost Diablo
programme.desc: A class field trip turns into a nightmare for Ralph and Bill when they are trapped in more ways than one while searching for a lost gold mine.

programme.title: Baroness Von Sketch Show
programme.desc: The all-female comedy series is created by and stars veteran Canadian actor Meredith MacNeill and Second City alumni Carolyn Taylor, Aurora Browne and Jennifer Whalen, who satirize modern life's everyday concerns.

programme.title: Baroness Von Sketch Show
programme.desc: The all-female comedy series is created by and stars veteran Canadian actor Meredith MacNeill and Second City alumni Carolyn Taylor, Aurora Browne and Jennifer Whalen, who satirize modern life's everyday concerns.

programme.title: The Legend of Bloody Jack
programme.desc: Campfire urban legend Bloody Jack comes to life when one of his kin resurrects him from the dead.

programme.title: Sunday School Musical
programme.desc: Two competing groups of high school students must rally together and enter a song and dance competition in order to save their church from closing.

programme.title: Asteroid VS Earth
programme.desc: When a shower of massive meteors threatens Earth's inhabitants with extinction, the worlds greatest minds devise a dangerous plan that will tilt the planet off its axis to avoid the impact.

programme.title: CarGO
programme.desc: A young car learns the importance of family when he embarks on a mission to rescue his father – who’s been sent to Clunker Island to be repurposed as junk metal.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Forgotten Souls of Errwood Hall
programme.desc: Sean heads to the Errwood Hall ruins in the Goyt Valley. It is said to be haunted by 3 spirits, and that it has its very own time slip. The investigation does not disappoint and although the hall is gone, the spirits remain.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean enters one of the UK's most haunted escape rooms and it appears that he is not the only one trying to escape. Will the spirits play games with him tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Escape the Escape Room - Part 2
programme.desc: The investigation continues at the escape room and a certain spirit attempts to tug at Sean's clothing. Will he finally survive the escape room?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lock Keepers Haunting at Lock 91
programme.desc: Sean heads to Manchester to investigate a lock keeper's cottage that was built in 1804. It appears that the spirits are still watching over the building and terrifying its customers.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1
programme.desc: Sean heads to Leeds and investigates Abbey House Museum among a maze of Victorian streets and shops. Who will he bump into tonight and what secrets does this location hold?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2
programme.desc: Sean continues his investigation at Abbey House Museum and ventures outside into the monastery ruins. Will he find the ghostly monk tonight?
programme.sub-title: Lights Out at Abbey House Museum - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub
programme.desc: Sean explores The Shakespeare pub in Manchester and meets Flecky Bennett to investigate claims dating back hundreds of years, about an evil chef that is haunting the pub.
programme.sub-title: The Evil Cook at The Shakespeare Pub

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Strange Things at Owd Betts
programme.desc: Sean heads to Rochdale and investigates strange paranormal reports at Owd Betts. Something spooky lurks in the basement and it seems Sean is not alone as he investigates the main bar.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Vandals from the Void
programme.desc: When Mongo is attacked by a fleet of UFOs, only Flash questions Ming's attempts to form an alliance with the Rebel forces.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Fangs of Fury
programme.desc: Thundar's mother falls fatally ill, and only Ming holds the antidote. His price for the cure: Flash Gordon! How will Thundar decide?

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Terror Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: Queen Kayla and her Shark People hold Flash captive underwater while Ming prepares a sneak attack on the Rebel forces.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Wings of Destruction
programme.desc: Flash competes against Aura in the Mongonian Aerial Games. Although a truce is in effect during the games, Ming attacks.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Invisible Claw
programme.desc: Sulpha, Ming's dragon scientist, creates an army of invisible Rock People to conquer a peaceful desert kingdom. Can Flash stop them?

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Pit of the Tigrons
programme.desc: While Ming is away, Aura takes command of Mongo. She offers a truce if Flash will agree to marry her and rule Mongo at her side.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Cry of the Pantheron
programme.desc: Kobalt the mercenary pretends to fall in love with Thundar, raising Flash's suspicions when he joins an attack on Ming's bomb factory.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Dragon Strikes
programme.desc: Flash, Dale and Dr. Zarkov discover Mango's legendary lost Hall of Science. Surprisingly, Sulpha helps keep the secret from Ming.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Wrath of Ming
programme.desc: Believing that Ming has lost his mind, Aura and Kayla hatch separate plots to overthrow Ming and take the throne of Mongo.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Rocket to Oblivion
programme.desc: Flash, Dale and Dr. Zarkov set off for Earth in an experimental space ship, unaware that Sulpha has hidden a bomb in the ship.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Ambush in Arboria
programme.desc: Dale joins forces with one of Ming's loyal supporters, handsome Prince Barin of Arboria. Is Dale betraying Flash and the rebellion?

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Moon of Mystery
programme.desc: Flash and Aura form an uneasy alliance to protect the peaceful inhabitants of a previously undiscovered moon from Ming's wrath.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: Revenge of the Dragon!
programme.desc: Sulpha finds a cache of what seem to be dragon eggs, and asks Flash to stall Ming while she searches for the secret to her lost race.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Fiendish Experiment!
programme.desc: Zarkov literally loses his mind in a dangerous Dynacrystal experiment, enabling Ming to lure Flash and Dale into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Flash Gordon: New Adventures: The Dungeons of Despair!
programme.desc: Ming throws Lynch in jail, but his replacement performs so well that Flash, Aura and Barin trick Ming getting Lynch back.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Turtle Trouble
programme.desc: An alligator snapping turtle is clamped to a man's neck and won't let go; an ER physician races against an impending hurricane to clear the ER of patients before it hits; and a tree trimmer is 20 feet above ground when he is impaled by his chainsaw.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Skewered Skydivers
programme.desc: Two skydivers, impaled by the same fence post, are rushed to the ER; multiple patrons from a dance club suddenly stop breathing and Dr. Jasper must determine the cause; and a bride-to-be may miss her wedding after her finger gets stuck in a make-up jar.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER
programme.desc: A patient arrives with paralysis in her legs; a boy is crushed by an ATV and the hospital doesn't have the right equipment to treat him; a doctor accidentally injects herself with epinephrine

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Junk food addict Andy moves into the feeding clinic with `too-busy-to-eat' Hannah, who battles with Andy's junk food medley as she forces down pizzas, burgers and kebabs.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s non stop tears and tantrums as 21 stone 5lbs LouiseHayes is forced to swap her normal 5-6 course feasts for superskinny Josh Evans‘s diet which barely features a proper meal.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s atale of twoAmy’s in the feeding clinic as Supersize Amy Green who tips the scales at a staggering 20 stone 8lbs swaps diets with Superskinny Amy Walsh who only weighs 7 stone 10.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: This week it’s war in the feeding clinic as Supersized meat addict 47 year old Dawn Grant goes into meltdown when 21 year old Superskinny calorie counting Charlene Sequiera refuses to eat her mountainous meals.

programme.title: Supersize Vs Superskinny
programme.desc: Tonight it’s a Supersize Vs Superskinny first-a double swap! Cake-aholicsmother and daughter Janet and Tara Wells swap diets with too busy to eat Joanne Evans and KeithLinage.
programme.sub-title: Janet and Tara vs Joanne and Keith

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy view houses in Cardiff, Redding and Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 25
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit an end of terrace in Sittingbourne, a house in Watford and in Alverston Derby Martin visits a two up two down.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see a farmhouse cottage with original features in Matlock, Derbyshire; an end-of-terrace in Eastleigh, Hampshire; and a two bedroom.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 6
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a damp property in Devon, a London flat with an exhibit for the antiques road show and a house in Leicester with surprising views out the back.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 20
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin travel to Ashford to see a top heavy house which looks like the architect may have had the plans the wrong way up! There's a semi in Derbyshire, but anyone tempted may have to bid twice if they also want the development land at the back.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 12
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three storey Victorian conversion in Devon, former pump station in Kent and a lower ground floor flat with garden in Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin see what happens when a house in Wales, a property in Essex and a terraced house in Birkenhead go up for auction. We will be finding out who buys them and what they pay for them when they go Under The Hammer!

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: Spaced Out
programme.desc: When three voluptuous female aliens crash-land in an English park, the result is close encounters of the sauciest kind! Three hapless men witness the UFO's arrival and are kidnapped by the sexy extra-terrestrials who discover the joys of first contact!

programme.title: The House That Dripped Blood
programme.desc: Robert Bloch, the author of Psycho, presents a quartet of terrifying tales. (1971)

programme.title: Capricorn One
programme.desc: A NASA Mars mission won't work, and its funding is endangered, so they decide to fake it just this once. But then they have to keep the secret. Starring: Elliott Gould, James Brolin, Brenda Vaccaro, O.J. Simpson, Sam Waterston

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Bar-Beef-Cue Celebration
programme.desc: Men love beer. Men love fire. Men love to eat. Put it all together and you get a backyard full of men feasting off of a beer inspired barbecued meal including roasted chicken on a beer can, beer wings, beer burgers and even a beer dressing.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Airband Concert Pre-Party
programme.desc: Rob and his close friends are singing in an airband contest. To commemorate this occasion Rob prepares a feast of fabulous food including Proscuitto wrapped veal, grilled baby onions, asparagus rafts and parmesan crusted scallops.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Japanese Farewell Dinner
programme.desc: Rob’s friend has just accepted a job to teach English in Japan. As a sendoff Rob is preparing an Asian Feast on the grill – juicy slow rotisserie duck, seared fresh tuna and smoked asian veggies. It’s a bon voyage dinner she certainly won’t forget!

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Godfather Italian Feast
programme.desc: Rob’s favourite movie of all time is The Godfather. He and his friends gather for an Italian feast off the grill before heading inside to watch the movie. Rob prepares pasta sauce, spicy Italian sausage, grilled veal chops and delicious calamari.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Caribbean Bon Voyage Fiesta
programme.desc: In honour of Rob’s neighbors’ grand prize win of all expenses paid cruise to the Caribbean, Rob prepares a Caribbean Feast. Smoked Pork loin in a passion fruit applesauce, jerk snapper and island salsa are all on his menu.

programme.title: Licence to Grill: Wine & Cheese Party
programme.desc: Rob is having a wine & cheese party with a bunch of his closest friends. From the lamb chops to the lobster tails - he combines the wine and cheese into every element of the delicious grilled menu.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Cashews and Carrots
programme.desc: Chef Lauren Gulyas tests her imagination with cashews and carrots. First, she makes cashew chicken and carrot cupcakes. But how will she combine them?

programme.title: A is for Apple: Cauliflower and Cranberries
programme.desc: In this “C” challenge, Chef Robert Jewell shows us what he can do with cauliflower and cranberries – on their own, and in one unconventional dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Asparagus and Artichoke
programme.desc: Chef Leah Wildman makes asparagus salad and artichoke stew before testing her cooking abilities by combining her key ingredients in one surprise dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Vanilla and Vinegar
programme.desc: Vanilla and vinegar in one dish? Chef Lauren Gulyas takes on the creative challenge of combining the unlikely pair in a delicious mashup.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Bacon and Bananas
programme.desc: Chef Robert Jewell plays with the flavours of bacon and bananas, making dishes with each ingredient before combining them in a fun, quirky dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Rapini and Raspberry
programme.desc: Chef Leah Wildman must work with the flavours of rapini and raspberry, and is challenged to combine the two ingredients in an imaginative final dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Pork and Pears
programme.desc: It’s prosciutto-wrapped pork and pear pasta as Chef Lauren Gulyas takes on pork and pears separately and then together in the same dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Olives and Onions
programme.desc: After picking “O,” Chef Robert Jewell makes French onion soup and olive chicken. Next he’s challenged to use onions and olives in one awesome dish.

programme.title: A is for Apple: Pork and Pineapple
programme.desc: Chef Leah Wildman’s pork and pineapple challenge brings about roast pork, caramelized pineapple polenta cake, and a fun dish using both ingredients.

programme.title: Hunter: Renegade
programme.desc: When Hunter investigates a drug ring, his ex-partner, Frank Garriman, becomes a suspect in the murder of the dealers.

programme.title: Hunter: The Black Dahlia
programme.desc: Detective Doyle comes out of retirement to help Hunter and McCall investigate the real-life murder of actress-turned-prostitute Elizabeth Short, who was cut in half 41 years before.

programme.title: Hunter: Not Just Another John Doe
programme.desc: When Hunter and McCall investigate the murder of an unidentified man, their interest is piqued because the victim seemingly never existed -- and the killing appears to be a professional murder.

programme.title: Hunter: Naked Justice - Part 1
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall investigate the mysterious death of a famous movie actress and encounter a surviving sister hungry for the inheritance.

programme.title: Hunter: Naked Justice - Part 2
programme.desc: Hunter, investigating the murder of a famous movie actress, follows a contract killer to Mexico and learns why the CIA is interested in the killing.

programme.title: Hunter: Girl on the Beach
programme.desc: Captain Devane tries to take Hunter and McCall off the investigation of his ex-wife's murder and violates his forced leave of absence to pursue the killer himself.

programme.title: Hunter: Bagota's Million
programme.desc: A Colombian drug dealer is murdered and police informant Sporty James becomes the prime suspect, hunted by both Hunter and the criminals.

programme.title: Hunter: Death Signs
programme.desc: Hunter and McCall's investigation of the stabbing of a deaf man hinges on cryptic clues the victim gave in sign language before he died.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Comedian Paddy McGuinness returns to take his motorbike test; Vicki takes two Audi TTs to the track for a shootout; Jason drives the Bowler Nemesis.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason teaches rugby legend and TV personality Matt Dawson how to drift like a hooligan in a 500 horsepower Audi supercar.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim reveals the best way for motorists to wash their cars; Jason pits three gold-medalist sailors against one another in a track race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Vicki visits the luxury car show Salon Privé and gives exclusive behind-the-scenes access as she judges the Best Supercar award.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim heads to London to investigate the new craze of car share clubs; Jason Plato meets up with celebrity chef James Martin, whose enviable car collection includes a busted Formula One.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford test drives the new Ford Fiesta; Vicki and Tiff are aided by renowned trainer Simon Pavey in a motorcycle race.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim Shaw takes Renault to task for overcharging customers; Tiff runs a shootout between two coupes; Vicki spends a day with Formula One star Lewis Hamilton.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Iwan Thomas accepts a stunt challenge from world-famous precision driver Russ Swift.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom Ford tests Mini's chic rival, the Fiat 500; "Fifth Gear" tests whether fuel additives really work by scientifically analyzing four different brands.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tom and Jonny enter the grueling Exeter Trial, a 24-hour off-road driving event that has been held for 100 years, in an old Volkswagen Beetle.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: In this edition of "Fifth Gear," Vicki Butler-Henderson finds out if the new 207 GTi is as exhilarating to drive as the 20-year-old hot hatch grandmaster, the 205GTi.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Jason gets to drive the new trek car from British specialists Westfield; guest presenter Robert Llewellyn drives an electric car from Japan.

programme.title: Fifth Gear
programme.desc: Tim gives some advice on how to prevent car theft. Tom meets up for some mayhem in a Fiat Qubo with a touring Guns 'n' Roses tribute band.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: Deadly Women: Obsession
programme.desc: Deciphering what causes minds to corkscrew out of control is the complex work of the criminal profiler. Obsessions can take many forms: beauty, devotion, ego and power.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love to Death
programme.desc: Love and money are a beautiful marriage, for the lucky ones they create a life of happiness and ease. Unless the love is of money, the bride is a killer, and the groom their victim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Killing Zone
programme.desc: In the 1990's the war on drugs was in full swing. The front lines were often America's inner cities where gangs use violence and murder to rule their empires.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped, a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Sons Of The Desert
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie's wives find out they've been tricked into believing they're on a medical cruise.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Block Heads
programme.desc: Unaware that the Great War has ended, Stan remains faithfully at his post for twenty years

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Below Zero
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie have a streak of back luck after their instruments get smashed.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Any Old Port!
programme.desc: In need of money, Ollie signs Stan up for a prize fight against an old nemesis.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Another Fine Mess
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie hide in a mansion to escape from a policeman.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Busy Bodies
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie battle inanimate objects, coworkers, and the laws of physics in a sawmill.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Perfect Day
programme.desc: Perfect Day is a 1929 short comedy film starring Laurel and Hardy.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Hog Wild is a 1930 American pre-Code Laurel and Hardy film, directed by James Parrott.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Blotto
programme.desc: Stan must lie to his wife to go out with Ollie.

programme.title: The Best Of Laurel And Hardy
programme.desc: The best moments from the most comical duo in film history: Stan Laurel and Oliver Hardy! This compilation features some of the funniest scenes from comedies that made this pair into household names.
programme.sub-title: The Best Of Laurel And Hardy (1939)

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Berth Marks
programme.desc: Stanley and Oliver stumble into the wrong sleeping compartment on the train to Pottsville.

programme.title: Laurel & Hardy: Sons Of The Desert
programme.desc: Stan and Ollie's wives find out they've been tricked into believing they're on a medical cruise.

programme.title: Jeff Garlin: Young And Handsome
programme.desc: Jeff Garlin, known by many for his role as Jeff Greene on Curb Your Enthusiasm, returns to his hometown and his comedy roots for his first hour-long special.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live: Elayne Boosler
programme.desc: Don't miss this rare chance to see the first female comic in history to land her own television special as she's joined by hilarious up-and-comers Mike Cross, Jen Kober and Ali Siddiq.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live: Harland Williams
programme.desc: Comedian Harland Williams hosts an all new UNCENSORED hour of hilarious stand-up. Don't miss the man with some of the most unforgettable roles in Dumb & Dumber and There's Something About Mary along with Erik Passoja, Casey Balsham and Mark Normand.

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live: Straight Outta Comicton

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.title: Exhibit A

programme.title: Exhibit A: Time Bomb
programme.desc: A bomb goes off in a postal truck in downtown Toronto. A security camera records the reaction of the burning postal driver. His trauma is so severe, he is put in an induced coma. Who set the bomb? Who was the target?

programme.title: Exhibit A: North Bay

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: When Joanne Albanese disappears after a night with her handsome, mysterious boyfriend, the FBI must unravel a twisted web of lies and fake identities.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: When Bobbi Jo Stinnett is found slaughtered in her home, her unborn baby ripped from her womb, the FBI goes on a frantic search to find the premature infant before she’s lost forever.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: In the backwoods of Louisiana, Jesse James Caston shoots his wife and her best friend…kicking off a bloody rampage that will endanger his own stepdaughters, and put the FBI to the test.

programme.title: FBI: Criminal Pursuit
programme.desc: A young mother of quintuplets is brutally murdered in her home, her young toddlers the only witnesses. The FBI delves into her past to find out who murdered her… but realize her killer has made himself untouchable.

programme.title: Access All Areas

programme.desc: New homeowners Juliette and John attempted to modernize their small kitchen but only managed to upgrade the counter and backsplash.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Longtime homeowners Carolyn and Derek have a wonderfully unconventional style - funky, colourful and a bit playful - but it never reached their home's top floor.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Building their dream home was easy for Ania and Walter - but the hard work was deciding how to decorate their vast master bedroom.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Lindsay has outgrown her childhood bedroom and is ready to leave her hand-me-down furniture and kiddy colours in the past.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Professional photographer Virginia loves her cottage-style home in the city - but lately it doesn't love her back.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Olivia's grandmother lived in this house her whole life. When she went into a home about 4 months ago, Olivia couldn't bear to see it sold to a stranger and purchased it.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Lauren and Mike call themselves 'the hand-me-down' family. Although they're into re-using and re-purposing pieces.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Lori and Jason bought a beautiful old house about 3 years ago and renovated the entire place, except for an awkward old kitchen space that's attached to their son Atticus's room.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Erin and Ryan are an active, eco-conscious and newly engaged couple with little time to think about decorating their living space.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Paula, Pete and their 2 children, Ava (9) and Eric (13) moved back to Toronto from Vancouver in August.

programme.title: Pure Design

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Sam's Mom, Colleen Pynn hasn't had the time to re-decorate her home. She has been in this house for 14 years and she's always liked it just the way it is. But over the past few years, she's started to softy ask Sam about re-designing her kitchen.

programme.title: Banger Boys
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Banger Boy HQ as the team prepare for two of the biggest races of the season.

programme.title: Banger Boys

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Camaro Cash-In

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Voodoo Demon

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Ballad of El Camino
programme.desc: After haggling down to a pretty reasonable price, Trey and Charles fight to bring a trashed up collectors dream back to life--a 1968 Chevy El Camino. On top of already being ridden with rust, the team must also find a way to turn a profit.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Heavy Chevy
programme.desc: Charles and Trey are hired to fix local legend and rock star Pepper Keenan's 1955 Chevrolet. In an effort to build business, they take on the challenge of rebuilding the engine to crank out 400+ horsepower for only $17,000.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Big Easy Bandit
programme.desc: Charles and Trey find their new project in a Pontiac Firebird Trans Am in their pal's junkyard. After further research Charles finds out it's a rare Trans Am referred to as the "Bandit Edition".

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Wild One
programme.desc: Charles and Trey head to a farm just outside of town to purchased their latest project--a run down 1967 Ford Mustang. After discovering its rarity, they must decide whether to take it back to stock or soup it up.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Po' Boy Pantera
programme.desc: The Bomb Factory has an opportunity to buy an extremely rare exotic muscle car. Since the asking price is too much, they go in on the car with a financial backer.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Mission Commission
programme.desc: After chasing it for an entire year, Charles finally finds and buys the classy 1962 Chrysler 300 he's been dreaming of. He and his team now face the challenge of having only ten days to give it the period correct customization.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Bet on the 'Vette
programme.desc: In an eerie abandoned warehouse, Charles discovers more than just ghosts--hidden in a damp corner, under a sheet, he finds a sleek, 1959 Chevrolet Corvette.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Maverick Mojo
programme.desc: When Charles and Trey snag a 1970 Ford Maverick Grabber along with a parts car, they're bringing in something a little more personal.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Franken-Fury
programme.desc: After a local lawyer informs Charles and Trey of an estate sale, they race over to find a rare 1968 Plymouth Fury 3. Because the Fury was seen simply as a conventional 60's family vehicle, it was overlooked by many vintage car collectors.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Get My Goat
programme.desc: With the business of the Bomb Factory growing, the team is hired by a man who is looking to create the car of his childhood dreams--a 1967 Pontiac GTO capable of going 0-60 mph in under 5 seconds.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Bayou Bronco
programme.desc: Charles and Trey get a call from a man deep in the Bayou looking to unload his 1971 Ford Bronco. The duo hope to revamp this pony in time for a classic car auction a few weeks away. Since Broncos aren't the typical car featured at a classic car auction.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: Mars has fired our imagination for thousands of years. The tantilizing possibility of life has made it the most inviting planet in our solar system. It is the only other place that man may one day call home.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our solar system 4.5 billions years ago, there remain many clues to reveal its evolution. Remnant debris, asteroids, and comets are what's left of the building blocks to our celestial neighborhood.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Gas Giants
programme.desc: In the cold, dark expanse of our solar system, beyond the asteroid belt, lie the giant planets. Some can be seen with the naked eye, others have been visited by our camera. What secrets do they hold?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympus
programme.desc: There are many more worlds in our solar system than just the planets. The mysterious moons of the gas giants may hold much more than we ever imagined. Each one is unique, and each one deserves a scrutinous eye.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Edge of the Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe, the further back in time we reach. Most of what we see is actually dark matter and dark energy, but its nature eludes us ... for the moment.

programme.desc: When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital.

programme.desc: At twelve, Crystal dated 20 year old Matt and was pregnant at 13. He served 15 months for sexual assault on a minor and is a registered sex offender. Is this inappropriate love or a misunderstanding?

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes invites the good doctor to their first murder investigation.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Margaret Martini's fiancee is missing, but the trail to his whereabouts leads to 7 other murders.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
