programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.
programme.sub-title: The Montrose Files: And Then There Were None

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Oh Brother, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Cap and Gown
programme.desc: Friend of the family, Kili, is joining the team to help track down a runner on the Hawaiian island of Maui. This is not the only thing on their schedule, because after the hunt, Kili has to hurry off to his college graduation ceremony!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Leland has to attend a Lamaze class before he can join the hunt--another Chapman is on the way! But when Dog starts to go after this accused jewelry thief without his fastest son, he learns that this fugitive puts the "R" in runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Tender Trap
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Greed is Good
programme.desc: Today's fugitive is accused of assaulting a police officer, so Dog and the team are not taking any chances. Dog has to play on his target's greed and deploy some modern technology to set a trap for this runner.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Tears for Fears
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa wakes up in a jail cell, but ignores the ensuing media frenzy in order to befriend a woman waging a personal battle against drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Picture This
programme.desc: A fugitive with a long criminal record has fled to Hawaii, and the bondsman on the mainland has asked Dog for help. Dog doesn't have much information to work with, but he can use the felon's desire to impress his friends to track him down.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Toad to Perdition
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Willie & Korie's Anniversorry
programme.desc: The Robertson family throws a party for Willie & Korie's 25th anniversary, but things take a dramatic turn when Willie and Korie reveal a big secret. Meanwhile, when Jase blames Uncle Si for getting him a parking ticket.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag
programme.desc: After Si has started moonlighting as a grocery bagger, the guys show up at the store and their teasing inadvertently causes Si to lose his job and his chance to enter a local bagging competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood
programme.desc: When a large storm hits Monroe, most of the adults head to Phil and Kay's to help protect their house from flooding while Jess, Sadie, Rebecca and Cole babysit the kids. Meanwhile, Jep, Si, Martin and Godwin try to protect the Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread
programme.desc: When the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread, it escalates into a full-on cornbread cook off. Meanwhile, when Jep, Martin, and Godwin play a practical joke on Uncle Si, it ends up being Si who has the last laugh.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a one-day rodeo fantasy camp where they learn the ins and outs of riding, roping and clowning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Ax Men: Teepee of Death
programme.desc: In Washington, Rygaard's remaining veterans go old school to keep the team on track. Deep in the Bayou, Shelby and Bob discover a valuable sinker cypress, but reeling it in is easier said then done.

programme.title: Ax Men: Old Log New Tricks
programme.desc: In the Louisiana Bayou, Shelby Stanga's jet boat is in desperate need of repair and he needs to find logs to buy a new engine.

programme.title: Ax Men: All's Fair in Loggin' War
programme.desc: Down in the swamps of Louisiana, Shelby Stanga is trying to upgrade his logging empire, so he takes a risk and tries out some new equipment.

programme.title: Ax Men: Don't Cross The Boss
programme.desc: In the Pacific Northwest, Rygaard logging has begun to claw its way back up the log count thanks to DJ Jeremiah, but today he's a no show.

programme.title: Ax Men: Davi and Goliath
programme.desc: Shelby Stanga is still without his jet boat, but fortunately he has his trusty assistant Davi and his Go-Devil to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Ax Men: Jet Logged
programme.desc: Shelby gets his jet boat back, and it now has a new five hundred horsepower engine that will help him get the job done.

programme.title: Ax Men: Log Runners
programme.desc: The battle for King of The Mountain rages on between the big boys of the Pacific Northwest. In Washington, the Rygaard crew has a problem with getting the wood to the mill, so Gabe's bringing in a trucking ace to get the job done.

programme.title: Ax Men: Cuts Like a Knife
programme.desc: The race for logs is heating up as Papac heads onto their most daunting site yet. Loggers fall through ten-foot holes in the brush and high stumps smash as the crew pulls some of the biggest, most dangerous turns of the season.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Honeymoon Came Early
programme.desc: A bitter bride stirs a feud with her maid of dishonor one night before the wedding. It seems monogamy was not on the mind of the would-be groom.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Company Cabaret
programme.desc: A former employee complains that her employer turned the workplace into a raunchy club! He claims she was a poor performer, but she says she didn't sign up for this kind of show!

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Mischievous Mover
programme.desc: A woman asks for a hand while moving her apartment, but what she got was a five finger discount that lifted everything in her possession. The defendant says he handled the situation with gloves, and that she's the one with meddling mittens.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Troubled Teen
programme.desc: We'll meet an emotional mom and her troubled teen as they battle over the Stilton family jewels. Mom says she tried everything to put the reigns on her wayward daughter, but the daughter refuses to be broken.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Bad Seed
programme.desc: A couple of bubbly botanists turn bankers after loaning their hired help money for a higher education. The defendant, however, cultivated the cash for purposes other than class.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye Series: The Distracted Drivers
programme.desc: A pair of distracted drivers wrestle over their right-of-way. Each claims to have seen green as they drove into their destination of disaster.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Splish Your Frock
programme.desc: Tiffany claims Kendra intentionally spilled a glass of red wine on her white dress. Kendra says she was merely trying to get back to her seat. Defendant says Tiffany had no business being in that section, therefore she owes her nothing.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Not My Corona
programme.desc: Helen is suing her neighbor, Justin, for giving her COVID-19. She says Justin ignored the rules posted in their building and entered the laundry room without a mask. Justin says he had not been diagnosed with COVID and did not have any symptoms.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Fit Flirter
programme.desc: Jenny says Luke owes her for training sessions for which she has already paid. Luke says Jenny was sexually inappropriate during their sessions, claiming she violated their working etiquette which broke their contract, therefore he owes her nothing.

programme.title: Judge Dad: No No in the Mo Mo
programme.desc: Burton claims Charles contacted his wife after he had a tryst at Charles' motel. He also claims Charles informed his wife of his visit with a young woman. Charles says he just called the number on the paperwork that was filled out.
programme.sub-title: No No in the Mo Mo

programme.title: Judge Dad: Lights, Camera, No Action
programme.desc: Becky is suing former landlord, Richard, for the 3 months of rent she paid. She left her lease early after she discovered her landlord was spying on her. Richard is counter-suing for the remaining 9 months of rent from the signed lease.

programme.title: Judge Dad: The Results Are Baked In
programme.desc: Ellen is suing Bobby, the owner of a small bakery after his bakery screwed up a gender reveal cake. The bakery owner claims he's not a doctor and shouldn't be held to a standard that makes him responsible for anything medically related.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Gold Digger
programme.desc: Patrice is suing Tiffany for stealing her husband and destroying her happy marriage of 20 years. Patrice claims Tiffany is nothing but a gold digger. Tiffany claims she never knew her boyfriend of ten months was married.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Secret Slasher
programme.desc: Adam says the friendship between Debbie and Julie was the cause of the majority of their fights and ultimately their break-up. Debbie says her friend, Julie, is a great friend and encouraged her to know her worth and finally break up with Adam.

programme.title: Judge Dad: Riding Dirty
programme.desc: Dax is married to Stephanie's sister, Liz. Stephanie says she was cut off by Dax, causing her to hit his car. Stephanie says not only did Dax not pay for the damage to her car, but Dax left her pregnant sister for the mystery woman in his car.

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 5: Luciano @ MDRNTY - Caprices Festival
programme.desc: Luciano rocked the MDRNTY stage at Caprices Festival in the middle of the mountains! Expect a wicked Pink Floyd remix...

programme.title: Live DJ Set: D'Julz - Rexist residency
programme.desc: In this weekly show, viewers will be able to discover new talents and to re-discover world-renowned Dj's. The second episode of the Rex Club 30 years anniversary invited DJulz the boss of Rex Clubs residency Bass Culture.

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 2: Ilario Alicante - Cocoon Stage @ We Are Fstvl

programme.title: Clubbing Experience - Series 2: Marcel Fengler @ Big Bang Festival 2018

programme.title: Live DJ Set: DJ Sneak
programme.desc: In Pure DJ Set, viewers will be able to discover new talents and to re-discover world-renowned Dj's, from Ibiza. DJ Sneak is passing by Ibiza to perform to you a pure dj set!

programme.desc: Andi lets Gary know that she is not ready to marry him. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: The Chase

programme.title: Black Card Revoked: 111
programme.desc: This laugh-out-loud game show is the "blackest" competition ever about all things black culture. Host: Tony Rock. Celebrity Partners: K. Michelle; Andra Fuller; Luenell.

programme.desc: This laugh-out-loud game show is the "blackest" competition ever about all things black culture. Host: Tony Rock. Celebrity Partners: Big Boy; Donnell Rawlings; Rotimi.

programme.title: Curvy Style with Timothy Snell: Modern Curves
programme.desc: Join Hollywood's hottest curvy stylist, Timothy Snell, as he races to pull off two chic and sophisticated looks, one fit for a Queen…Queen Latifah that is, and the other, a makeover for an Atlanta mom with a serious addiction to leggings.

programme.title: Curvy Style with Timothy Snell: Curvy Decolletage
programme.desc: Lights, camera, curves! Celebrity stylist Timothy Snell is at it again as he hustles to dress grammy nominated R&B diva Jazmine Sullivan, as well as newly divorced, single mother Jenele, who is in all the way from Kansas City!

programme.title: Run's House: Outside The Box
programme.desc: Making the Honor Roll has been something Rev and Justine have come to expect from Diggy and Russy over the years. So when their latest report cards show them not making it, Rev confronts the boys about it.

programme.title: Run's House: Mole Beauty, Mole Problems
programme.desc: A trip to the orthodontist for Diggy and Russy brings the family some surprising news: That Russy will be getting his braces off before Diggy, who will have to wait another two months.

programme.title: Run's House: Rev's Ol' Wild West
programme.desc: With their Spring Break on the horizon, Diggy and Russy try to convince Rev and Justine to take them on a trip. Rev decides that the family should take the vacation package that he won in a Rush Philanthropic charity auction.

programme.title: Run's House: Age Against The Machine
programme.desc: With their first book written together, "Take Back Your Family," now complete, Rev and Jus begin the process of recording the book on tape version.

programme.title: Run's House: Operation Album Drop
programme.desc: Team Blackout's media blitz continues as they hold a radio interview in support of their first live performance. But when the band finds out they're being assigned a choreographer for the gig they are resistant.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Cooking Episode
programme.desc: Nick and Suzanne go head to head in the kitchen when Nick says cooking is \\"easy\\" and Suzanne challenges him to a family cooking competition.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Regift Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne tries to return an unlikely gift from Marilyin with Nick not knowing.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?: The Suzanne Gets Arrested Episode
programme.desc: Suzanne gets arrested and decides to change her stubborn ways.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Drowned
programme.desc: Kim and her family have been frightened out of their seaside Maryland home. Multiple family members have reported sightings of children with purple lips and strange noises emanating from the nearby creek.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Shadow Caster
programme.desc: PRS investigates an Alabama home where clients, Georgiana and her two daughters, are so terrified, they moved out after only 18 months. They have seen shadow figures, been touched and have a recorded EVP stating, "Look at me, get out of here."

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Haunted Piano
programme.desc: Ryan and the PRS team are called in when unlucky antique collectors unwittingly bring a paranormally-infested piano into their home. The team attempts to dismantle and destroy the offending instrument.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Southern Discomfort At Sweetwater Mansion
programme.desc: PRS heads to the Deep South to investigate a haunted Antebellum Mansion in disrepair. The caretaker and volunteers at the property have many a tale to tell of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead
programme.desc: A single mom claims she is being physically assaulted by a spirit in her Kentucky home. Ryan first explores a natural explanation for the alleged phenomena. But the client's five-year-old son also sees spirits, and his sightings appear to line up.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Do Bad Things
programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Messenger
programme.desc: Kelli and her husband Riley are frightened in their coastal Oregon home. They are plagued by a headless apparition and often hear mysterious noises that resemble cries for help from the dark corners of their house.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: Ryan leads his team to one of the most haunted places in the US to confront their fears and solve a paranormal mystery. Aside from the alleged spirits of dead prisoners, something even darker may be lurking inside West Virginia State Penitentiary.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Supernatural Seduction
programme.desc: PRS investigates the Campbell House, where the Innkeeper and guests claim to have sexual encounters with a spirit who has deep ties to a family tragedy.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Permission To Do Harm
programme.desc: When a mirror levitates and shatters on its own, P.R.S. heeds the call to investigate a spirit that has been unleashed on an unsuspecting family. Ryan must track down the spirit and contain it before it does irreparable damage.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Right Thing
programme.desc: Jonathan inspires a young man to help the grandfather who has recently been placed in a nursing home.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 1
programme.desc: Lizzy MacGill is a horse trainer's young daughter who elopes with Garth Armstrong, a privileged man.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Thoroughbreds - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help Lizzie. The new bride has cancer and she is pregnant.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 1
programme.desc: Mark and Jonathan become counselors at a camp for children with cancer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: A Song for Jason - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are helping patients at Camp Good Times in different ways. But a father still refuses to deal with his son's illness.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Bless the Boys in Blue
programme.desc: Jonathan relinquishes his angelic powers for awhile and realizes the dangers that Mark has faced being a police officer.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Cindy
programme.desc: An aspiring actress wants to be accepted for who she really is, not in the image her well-meaning dad tries to transform her into.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Duty Calls
programme.desc: Kimberly met her husband in the Air Force. They lived an active lifestyle until his health forced him into a wheelchair. The stress of care giving and years of smoking has caught up to her and it's Kimberly's turn to receive some care.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: One Busy Momma
programme.desc: Yesenia is a busy hard working wife, mother of twin teenagers and a toddler, who is constantly on the go and has no time for herself. It's our mission to give her the time and attention she deserves and help her feel more vibrant again.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Sizing Down And Looking Up
programme.desc: Allison has battled with her weight her entire life, and although she's lost 70 pounds through hard work and exercise, she still feels incredibly self-conscious about her appearance. Allison avoids certain social situations because of her insecurity.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: The Trials of Tracy
programme.desc: Tracy is a New York City lawyer who can't find a man. Her frumpy wardrobe and thick glasses keep her home buried in her books for fear of rejection. But our team is on the case to bring this lonely lawyer out of her shell and gain some needed confidence.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Bikini Special - Heather Williams
programme.desc: NHS Manager Heather Williams is the perfect candidate: after a weight loss of five stones and three years of four times a week gym workouts, all that remained of her former size 20 body was a sack of excess skin covering a tiny 4 foot eleven frame.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: A League Of Her Own
programme.desc: Kim is a single mom who's bitter divorce and loss of her father caused her to stop caring for her appearance. Now her only happiness is at the bowling alley. We're going to put Kim in a league of her own and help her look 10 YEARS YOUNGER.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Back En Vogue
programme.desc: Wendy is a dedicated mom who left the fashion business to care for her ailing child, born with a cleft palate. But she neglected herself. Now that her daughter's well again, Wendy needs our help to get back in style and take on the fashion industry.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Better Days Ahead
programme.desc: Serena came to the U.S. from Cambodia at age seven and helped care for her younger siblings. She loves them, but does not love being mistaken for their mother. Serena had to grow up too fast, but she doesn't have to look like it.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Heather Williams Re-Visit
programme.desc: Nicky Hambleton-Jones revisits 42-year-old Heather Williams from Essex.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger USA: Grey Skies To Blue
programme.desc: Between her busy family life, and a scrapbook business on the side, Christine barely has time for herself. After 20 years of marriage and three kids, she's in need of a makeover and some serious rekindled romance.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger New Zealand: Cathy Horgan
programme.desc: Cathy Horgan was once a yummy mummy, but a house full of boys has taken its toll. Cathy needs help and she needs it fast if she's to look 10 years younger in just 10 days.

programme.title: 10 Years Younger UK: Liz O'Reilly
programme.desc: Bedford deputy newspaper editor, Liz O'Reilly, 40, has some stories to tell and a lifetime of sun, stress and smoking means they're mostly written on her face. Presenter and stylist Nicky Hambleton-Jones is on hand to crack the whip.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 4
programme.desc: Danny's first big project as State Vet is a major animal translocation, and he is desperate to impress. Meanwhile, whilst Alice is out in the bush treating an injured zebra, she is stalked by lions. She makes it back to her jeep in time but is shaken up.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 5
programme.desc: Alice is still suffering from a loss of nerve after her close shave with the lions and so Danny tries to help her overcome her problems – the Leopard's Den lions have produced their first cub and he needs Alice back in the saddle.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 6
programme.desc: In his role as State Vet, Danny works with wealthy conservationist, Anton Ziegler, to catch a group of leopard hunters. Ziegler is also buying a tiger from Vanessa, who struggling with her finances, desperately needs the money to ensure Mara's future.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 7
programme.desc: Du Plessis has started a one man campaign of vandalism against the new neighbours at Mara; Peeters and the mining company. When Peeters catches him on CCTV, Du Plessis is fined and given a restraining order to keep him away from Mara.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 8
programme.desc: Du Plessis comes to meet Caroline's plane but he doesn't seem happy – he has seen that the mining company have already started building the road which threatens Leopard's Den.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 9
programme.desc: The family are making arrangements to leave Leopard's Den, all except Du Plessis who is steadfastly refusing to accept that he has lost his home. He won't use his share of the money from the sale of the land to buy somewhere else.

programme.title: Wild At Heart: Episode 10
programme.desc: The family have been squatting at Leopard's Den as they prepare to make their last stand to prevent the bulldozers from destroying their home. Du Plessis and Fatani bring elephants and a giraffe to dissuade the construction crew from moving in.

programme.title: Wild At Heart
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Leopard's Den, the family are split across continents. Caroline, Liv and a heavily pregnant Alice are in the UK, while Danny and Du Plessis have remained in South Africa.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 6
programme.desc: Belieber Nathan decides it's time for Sketch to rid him of his embarrassing fan tattoo.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 7
programme.desc: Sketch meets Billy, whose habit of tattooing himself to impress ladies has got out of hand.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers: Episode 8
programme.desc: Sketch removes model Kelly's lower-back tattoo. Alice tackles Laim's DIY tattoo disaster.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 31
programme.desc: It's time for the Fallon's, Scott's and Macleod's to say goodbye to Dr. Tanya Byron. Tanya shows each of the families how far they have come during their stay by showing them clips from during their stay.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 32
programme.desc: Today work really begins for the families. Yesterday was an eventful day, and today Tanya wants to start introducing the families to activities and tasks so they can start to face up to their parenting problems.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 33
programme.desc: Tanya is relieved that Ethan had a breakthrough with eating a chip yesterday, but feels there is lots of work to do – Sacha is being strong and determined, but Simon is still showing signs of being a soft touch with Ethan.

programme.title: House of Tiny Tearaways: Episode 34
programme.desc: Nina feels self conscious when playing with the girls and is blaming them for their sleep problems. Dylan is trying to set up his brother Owen in order to win the sticker chart competition.

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: Boss Hoss Rally 2011, Part 2
programme.desc: No 'Boss Hoss' looks like the other. Each bike has been built and painted individually for its owner. The bikes come unpainted to the dealer from the plant in Dyersbourg in the State of Tennessee, USA. (Part 2 of 2)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: El Toro Run 2011, Part 1
programme.desc: For the third time in a row, the team from SKS Travel in collaboration with Robinson Club has put together a varied and eventful program here in southern Spain. Around 180 bikers have booked this trip. (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: El Toro Run 2011, Part 2
programme.desc: For the third time in a row, the team from SKS Travel in collaboration with Robinson Club has put together a varied and eventful program here in southern Spain. Around 180 bikers have booked this trip. (Part 2 of 2)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: European Bike Week 2011, Part 1
programme.desc: Lake Faaker in Carinthia. A popular holiday paradise in southern Austria - and as well, a place with a special tradition. In September, the region is a travel destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate here their huge annual party. (Part 1 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: European Bike Week 2011, Part 2
programme.desc: Lake Faaker in Carinthia. A popular holiday paradise in southern Austria - and as well, a place with a special tradition. In September, the region is a travel destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate here their huge annual party. (Part 2 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: European Bike Week 2011, Part 3
programme.desc: Lake Faaker in Carinthia. A popular holiday paradise in southern Austria - and as well, a place with a special tradition. In September, the region is a travel destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate here their huge annual party. (Part 3 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: European Bike Week 2011, Part 4
programme.desc: Lake Faaker in Carinthia. A popular holiday paradise in southern Austria - and as well, a place with a special tradition. In September, the region is a travel destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate here their huge annual party. (Part 4 of 5)

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle: European Bike Week 2011, Part 5
programme.desc: Lake Faaker in Carinthia. A popular holiday paradise in southern Austria - and as well, a place with a special tradition. In September, the region is a travel destination for thousands of bikers who celebrate here their huge annual party. (Part 5 of 5)

programme.title: Classic Races: Pikes Peak
programme.desc: The Pikes Peak Hill Climb is a rather different type of race in the mountains of Colorado, USA. It's unique, fascinating and full of adventure. One of the starters at the 1987 Pikes Peak is two-time rally world champion Walter Röhrl.

programme.title: Classic Races: Grand Prix Races since 1934
programme.desc: Since 1934 the Grand Prix has been the most exciting and fascinating world championship in the world. With its state-of-the-art vehicles featuring horsepower from the biggest brands, it never fails to wow its viewers.

programme.title: Classic Races: Rallye Year 1972 - A Ford Success Story
programme.desc: The international championship for manufacturers was a rally series which ran from 1970 to 1972. Car manufacturers such as Porsche, Renault and Ford all took part, with Ford having an exceptionally successful year in 1972.
programme.sub-title: Rallye Year 1972 - A Ford Success Story

programme.title: Classic Races: German Touring Championship 1992
programme.desc: The 1992 German Touring Car Championship is one of the most important racing series in German motorsport for sure. It's hard, merciless and well known for its die-hard battles between the ruthless competitors.

programme.title: Classic Races: Touring Car Grand Prix, Argentina 1964
programme.desc: Tropical temperatures, never-ending dust and curves: those are just some of the many difficulties for man and machine during the 1964 Grand Prix in Argentina. This race was responsible for taking the Mercedes brand to the top.

programme.title: Classic Races: Indy 500 1994
programme.desc: The Indy 500 is one of the world's most spectacular motor races in the world. Watched by a huge number of people, this motorsports event doesn't fail to impress at the Indianapolis Motor Speedway.

programme.title: The Ambassador: The Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: The new British Ambassador to Ireland, Harriet Smith, arrives in Dublin to discover that the Irish government is accusing the British of sinking one of their ships in the Irish Sea.

programme.title: The Ambassador: Vacant Possession
programme.desc: Ambassador Smith gives the battered British wife of a Saudi diplomat refuge in the embassy. The decision may have major repercussion for the Irish government.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Wanna Be Startin' Somethin'
programme.desc: Jane and Holly J team up for a practicum business assignment and immediately bond over their idea to start a babysitting agency.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Beat It, Pt. 1
programme.desc: Riley’s having a great semester. He’s even taking lifeguard training to prepare for a summer job.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Beat It, Pt. 2
programme.desc: News travels fast about Riley and Sam’s big fight. Riley doesn’t think much of it – until rumours start spreading that Sam was gay-bashed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Waiting For A Girl Like You (aka Love Games - US)
programme.desc: It’s Matchmaker week at Degrassi and Declan’s not interested in a serious relationship. The Diplomat brat is here for a good time, not a long time.
programme.sub-title: Waiting For A Girl Like You (aka Love Games - US)

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Somebody (aka Love Games - US)
programme.desc: Against all odds, Holly J has fallen for Declan. Suddenly she gets what everyone’s been so excited about for so long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Heart Like Mine, Pt. 1
programme.desc: KC’s living the high school dream. The basketball team made it to the provincial finals, the Sports Awards Gala is coming up, and he finally has a mentor who gets him – Coach Carson.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Heart Like Mine, Pt. 2
programme.desc: KC’s life is on the fast track. With the final basketball game approaching, pressure is at an all time high and Coach Carson has really taken KC under his wing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation: Holiday Road
programme.desc: Emma and Kelly make a pit stop at Degrassi while on their Cross Country Bike Adventure raising awareness for their Re-Cycle project. Combining the great outdoors with her sexy boyfriend, Emma’s convinced she’s destined for the best summer ever.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 4
programme.desc: Whilst Reggie is busy working on his new Grot product range, David reveals his true colours to Nicola at the swimming baths. William is getting increasingly desperate in his attempts to get out of the wedding.

programme.title: Reggie Perrin: Episode 5
programme.desc: With Grot a huge success, Reggie has a difficult choice to make at Groomtech. Meanwhile, his attempts to make things up with Nicola lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bump In the Night
programme.desc: When a pretty, young pilot is found in bed, bound and with a bullet in her head, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if this was a random assault or payback for something that happened in the skies.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. The only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim’s own blood.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Opie & Flirt
programme.desc: Black lab mix Opie is a charmer around people, but frighteningly aggressive around other dogs. Energetic to the point of being neurotic, Chinese Crested Flirt cannot sit still for one moment.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar explains how he reads a dog's energy and body language as he deals with two Jack Russell terriers who grew up together but fight violently.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Sasha & Shep
programme.desc: Lhasa Apso Sasha, bares her teeth at anyone who takes anything from her. White German Shepherd, “Shep,” goes after strangers, making it impossible for his wheelchair bound owner to control.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Kobe, Banjo, and Kisses
programme.desc: An aggressive one-eyed Australian shepherd needs special treatment. A traumatized black and tan coonhound is terrified of people, a Maltese gets a little too excited when guests drop by.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Baby Girl
programme.desc: Suzie Dove Miles, a "cat whisperer," is set on getting a fearful Doberman mix at a shelter. Suzie has tried many of Cesar's exercises with Baby Girl, but needs Cesar’s expertise to help Baby Girl become a real dog.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Inside Puppy Mills
programme.desc: This powerful episode delves into the horror of puppy mills and the rescue and rehab of traumatized pups by the Last Chance for Animals non-profit organization.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Emily
programme.desc: Emily, a Pit Bull, has become every owner’s worst nightmare – extremely aggressive towards other dogs. She’s so out of control, only Cesar Millan’s 6-week boot camp can turn her behavior around.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Calvin, Rudy, and Milo
programme.desc: A ridgeback mix needs help recovering from a car accident that left him with three-legs; a manic Jack Russell chases motorcycles; and a border collie's herding instincts are out of control.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to a Doll/Eats Plastic Bags
programme.desc: Robert, a 23-year-old man who's addicted to eating plastic newspaper bags, an addition so intense, that he goes days without food. Catherine, a 48-year-old woman whose best friend is a doll.
programme.sub-title: Addicted to a Doll/Eats Plastic Bags

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Couch Cushion/Furry
programme.desc: While battling her addiction to eating couch cushions, Adele has destroyed 7 couches and 2 chairs. Meanwhile, Lauren is more comfortable in her fur suit than in her own skin.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Sucker/Bodybuilder
programme.desc: Lauren was once addicted to drugs and alcohol, but now is addicted to body-building, which may have caused long term health problems. Meanwhile, Rhonda has been addicted to sucking her thumb ever since her parents divorced when she was a child.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Ketchup_Mustard
programme.desc: Ketchup or Mustard? Barry owns the world’s largest mustard collection numbering 5,500 bottles from 80 countries. Ralph’s rare collection of Ketchup bottles includes a patent bottle from 1891.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: My Strange Addiction Special 1
programme.desc: “My Strange Addiction” tells the story of people who just can't stop doing very strange things, including a compulsive tanner, a runner, a shopper and a chalk eater.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Addicted to My Breasts/Tape Eater
programme.desc: Sheyla has spent $250,000 on 22 breast enlargement surgeries to achieve her 38KKK bust size, despite suffering a severe infection from her recent implants. Andrea is addicted to eating adhesive tape.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Can’t Stop Cleaning/Love Rocks
programme.desc: Cyntrelle dropped out of high school because of her addiction to cleaning. Belinda's obsession with rocks has taken over her life, with more than 100,000 scattered around her home.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: My Strange Addiction Special 2
programme.desc: In this one-hour special, we revisit six of our addicts whose stories shocked the world. Tune in for exclusive never before seen footage in this special episode.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Greg Dreams of Jeannie_The Amazing Squirrel
programme.desc: Greg’s obsession with 60’s pop-culture has literally taken over his home. Kelly’s life revolves around her pet squirrel, Sugar Bush and his photo appearances.
programme.sub-title: Greg Dreams of Jeannie_The Amazing Squirrel

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Laxatives and Pottery/Ashes
programme.desc: Kimberly takes hundreds of laxatives a day in an attempt to lose weight. Meanwhile, Bianca prefers to eat pottery and cigarette ashes instead of food.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Love Bunnies_ World's Strongest Family
programme.desc: The Best family is so obsessed with their own strength that they spend countless hours lifting weights. Candace and Steve's collection of bunny items has reached nearly 30,000 pieces.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Extreme Hair/Addicted to Bee Stings
programme.desc: Asha hasn't cut her 21-foot long hair in nearly a quarter century and spends up to six hours a day grooming her ten-pound locks. Margaret has stung herself over 50,000 times with bees.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Identical Twin Obsession / Eats Mattresses
programme.desc: Twins Amy and Becky are addicted to being identical, looking alike, acting alike, and even weighing their meals to stay the same size. Jennifer is addicted to eating mattresses.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Wake Zone Getaway
programme.desc: Ross and Sarah want a new bayou home where they can walk out their front door onto their fishing boat. They discover a house on an island can make getting there tough.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Cajun Cabins
programme.desc: Pat and Joyce want their own slice of the southern frontier. They're looking for a hunting cabin that has the wilderness he wants, but the space she desires.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Redneck Riviera
programme.desc: Spear fisherman Clay and his girlfriend Jackie are looking for their first home together around Pensacola, Florida, an area where the bayou meets the beach, known as the Redneck Riviera.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Mississippi High Rises
programme.desc: Matthew and Lindsey are looking for a camp of their own. Lake Mary houses can flood, so the couple is looking for a high rise home, lifted 20 feet off the ground!

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Backwoods Paradise
programme.desc: Life in the bayou is all about family and passing down traditions. Blane is looking for a place where he can spend quality time with his teenage daughter, doing what their family does best – hunting.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Beached, Bayous, Backwoods
programme.desc: Jamie and his fiancée Brandi are looking for a home to start their life together near Gulf Shores, Alabama. But there’s one problem – Jamie wants a house on the bayou, but Brandi prefers the beach.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Mud Loving Camps
programme.desc: Trey and Jacob are two best friends who want to buy a backwoods getaway home for them and their families. They discover properties where the fields have been flooded to attract wild birds.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Burbs to the Bayou
programme.desc: Marty and Shelly grew up in the backwoods of the Mississippi bayou. But recently they’ve been stuck in the suburbs. So now they’re looking for a new home that will get them back into wilderness.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Biloxi Jackpot
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts, Rowdy and Stevi, want to move into a starter home on the bayou. They love the excitement of nightlife and gambling so they’re looking for a house close to Biloxi’s casinos.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Cajun Inventor
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Donnie and Laurie have dreamed of having a weekend fishing camp on the bayou for as long as they can remember. Now, that dream can become a reality.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: City Girl and Bayou Boy
programme.desc: Newly engaged couple - Barrett and Haley - are looking for their first home on the bayou, but there’s one problem: he’s from the country and she’s from the city, so they’re sure to butt heads.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Off The Beaten Bayou
programme.desc: David and Blair love getting out on the waters of the Louisiana Bayou, so they want a weekend waterfront getaway home. But these houses come with their own hassles.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Striking It Rich
programme.desc: Carter and his wife Colleen have made millions from the bayou oil industry, so now they want a million dollar home on the water. In the bayou, that kind of money can buy luxury.

programme.title: Buying Bayou: Tiki Hut Millionaires
programme.desc: Tiki King, Leo, and his fiancée, Stephanie, are looking for a waterfront castle on Perdido Bay. They are looking along the shores of Florida and Alabama to find the million-dollar home of their dreams.

programme.title: Baywatch: Nightmare Bay, Part 2
programme.desc: When a fishing trawler mysteriously sinks, the “Creature in the Bay” is thought responsible! Mitch, Devon and Captain Thorpe set out to prove there is more than meets the eye behind this Creature's mysterious attacks.

programme.title: Baywatch: The One Who Got Away
programme.desc: After Baywatch lifeguard Megan is attacked on the beach, she struggles to regain her confidence – unaware that her attacker, a fisherman, views her as the "One That Got Away." Meanwhile, Shauni suffers from lifeguard burnout.

programme.title: Baywatch: Money, Honey
programme.desc: After Mitch makes a heroic ocean rescue while working at her private beach party, a Hollywood producer offers Mitch the starring role in a movie. Meanwhile, Harvey and Shauni hold a wild bikini contest to raise money for an aquatic rescue group.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Fabulous Buchannon Boys
programme.desc: Mitch receives an unexpected visit from his free-spirited brother, whose troubled son entices Hobie to surf the pylons of a treacherous condemned pier. Meanwhile, a local vendor nearly causes a riot when his bikinis disintegrate in the water.

programme.title: Baywatch: Point of Attack
programme.desc: After helping break up a gang fight on the beach, Eddie gets the idea of having some gang members join the lifeguard W.A.T.E.R. program designed to help troubled youths.

programme.title: Baywatch: Sandcastles
programme.desc: Baywatch lifeguards gain insight into the plight of the homeless when Hobie befriends a girl who's living on the streets. Eddie is attacked by a former mental patient known as “Hector the Collector.”

programme.title: Baywatch: Thin or Die
programme.desc: Eddie goes on a blind date with Nicole, who turns out to be morbidly overweight, which leads to complications and an unlikely friendship. But Nicole's diet pills prove life threatening... Meanwhile, Mitch’s life is comically disrupted by a stray dog.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Trophy, Part 1
programme.desc: Eddie is arrested for statutory rape after a teenage girl lies about seducing him in his tower. Meanwhile, Eric Turner, bitter about the paralyzing accident he suffered as a lifeguard, returns to Baywatch to reconcile his relationship with Megan.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 7
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wreath, Terror Night, Tants, The Candidate, The Ring.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: E-Mail, Blood Donor, Epitaph, Stiches in Time, Soldier.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wealthy Widow, The Witness, The Accident, Bad Dreams, Mental.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Red Line, Two Sisters, Eclipse, The Ice Box, The Gathering.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 1
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Morning Sickness, The Curse of Hampton Manor, Wax Executioner, Blood Bank, Ring Toss.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 9
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Rock and Roll Ears, The Bucket, The Bridesmaid, Voice from the Grave, The Chess Game.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 4
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Wrestler, The Escape, Dead Friday, Ghost Visitor, The Lady in a Black Dress.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Fire Station 32, The Computer, The Girl Next Door, The Wallet, The Woods.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7949
programme.desc: Charlie makes a sweet proposal of marriage to Pam in the Forrester kitchen. As Brooke runs into Bill at Il Giardino, Ridge and Thorne get riled up about Bill’s interference in their lives.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7950
programme.desc: Pam becomes concerned when a livid Ridge asks her to track down Bill’s whereabouts. Brooke makes a peace offering to Steffy before voicing her concerns about Ridge’s anger towards Bill.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7951
programme.desc: Liam and Hope share a loving moment when they learn the gender of their unborn child. Ridge and Thorne’s heated confrontation with Bill quickly turns into a down and dirty brawl.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7952
programme.desc: Dollar Bill’s life hangs in the balance as a result of his encounter with Ridge and Thorne. Pam threatens Quinn to not ruin her wedding when Quinn makes a dig at Pam’s unstable past.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7953
programme.desc: Ridge and Thorne defend themselves to Brooke and Katie about their involvement in Bill’s fall. Danny introduces Quinn to Tyler and Brett who have brought gifts for her to Forrester Creations.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7954
programme.desc: While Liam talks to his unconscious father, Detective Sanchez questions Ridge and Thorne. Quinn steps into trouble when Pam escalates their argument over Stephanie’s portrait.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7955
programme.desc: Eric confronts his own feelings when he is forced to referee between Pam and Quinn. Thorne sneaks into Bill’s hospital room after Katie asks him what he will tell Will if Bill dies.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7956
programme.desc: Brooke is stunned when Dollar Bill asks her to remove a significant part of his past. Eric finds himself at odds with Quinn when she becomes unyielding in her denial of Pam’s request to marry in their home.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7957
programme.desc: Donna and Eric find themselves in an unexpected, but surprisingly familiar, situation. Ridge is shocked when Bill makes an unexpected statement to Detective Sanchez about the fight that landed him in the hospital.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7958
programme.desc: Pam reflects back on her relationship with Stephanie and her mother, Ann. Ridge expresses his anger over Bill’s continued overtures to Brooke by destroying a memento Bill gave her.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7959
programme.desc: A tense situation turns into threats and accusations when Ridge confronts Bill about going after his wife. Eric walks in on heated stand-off between Quinn and Pam and two portraits!

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7960
programme.desc: Quinn feels left out of the conversation when Eric, Ridge, Brooke, Thorne, Katie and Donna meet for dinner. Steffy gives Leo, a long-time buyer at Forrester, a sneak peek at the Intimates collection.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7961
programme.desc: Bill learns that Justin has uncovered interesting information about Ridge and Judge McMullen. Quinn eavesdrops as Eric and Donna reminisce about their past over a bottle of honey bear.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7962
programme.desc: Brooke is taken aback when Bill grills her about possible foul play in his custody case with Katie. Donna gives as good as she gets when confronted by Quinn about her intentions with Eric.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7963
programme.desc: Brooke is majorly conflicted between doing what’s right for Bill and being loyal to her husband, Ridge. Working on behind the scenes photos during fashion show prep, Emma spies Zoe and Xander flirting from a distance.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7964
programme.desc: Clearly worried about who knows the truth, Ridge begs Brooke to stay away from Bill. Steffy shines as she models the showstopper in the first official Intimates fashion show.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful: 7965
programme.desc: Emma takes a big leap in a new direction when Xander asks her to move forward in their relationship. Dollar Bill hires an expert to embark on a fact finding mission to bring down Ridge Forrester.
Five Carnival employees are kidnapped on the morning of Halloween 1976 and held hostage in a remote industrial Hell.

programme.title: The Brain That Wouldn't Die
programme.desc: A doctor experimenting with transplant techniques keeps his girlfriend's head alive when she is decapitated in a car crash, then goes hunting for a new body.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Inheritance
programme.desc: In a seedy bar washed up drunk Michael Barry tells the presenter how an elderly countess to whom he was a gigolo died wearing a beautiful necklace, as did her dowdy companion who inherited the jewelry.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Open Window
programme.desc: Artist Anthony March has a premonition of his neighbor's untimely death.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: A Message from Clara
programme.desc: A student taking night classes falls in love with his beautiful teacher. However, he begins to suspect that his dead ex-girlfriend may be using the teacher to try to communicate with him.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Forked Lightning
programme.desc: Two men who don't know each other find that their lives are intertwined by a strange psychic connection that may end up in the deaths of both.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Reunion
programme.desc: The setting is Germany in 1939 and a group of young glider enthusiasts are startled to learn of the Third Reich's invasion of Poland. Knowing their lives must now go in separate directions, they plan a reunion picnic.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Dead Ringer
programme.desc: A woman called Esther has unsettling visions of buildings set alight by an arsonist and claims that her sister, whom she has not seen for many years, is responsible.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: The Stone Cutter
programme.desc: Elderly Simon Lockhart is convinced that he will die in just a few days, because a mysterious stone cutter has already chiseled that date onto his tombstone.

programme.title: One Step Beyond: Make Me Not a Witch
programme.desc: A farm girl's parents are terrified when their daughter reveals that she can read minds. But a priest knows that her gifts can save two young lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Night In
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret find themselves at loose ends one evening when, to their dismay, they find that there is absolutely nothing to watch on TV.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Blood, Sweat and Tears
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret decide they need to get fit.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Holiday
programme.desc: This charming, witty animated series focuses on the ordinary lives of a middle class dentist and his foot doctor wife. Together, they tackle traumas as being burgled, going on a holiday and deciding whether or not having a child will ruin their lives.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Discomfort of Strangers
programme.desc: Margaret fears that her relationship with Bob is getting stale after they have a petty argument.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween. It is also Bob father's birthday and his mother wants to celebrate by visiting his grave. Bob is not comfortable with this and tries to get out of it.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: The Nanny: Ship of Frans
programme.desc: Fran goes on a cruise to meet her dream man; Maxwell crashes her vacation hoping to stop her from meeting anyone.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Bird's Nest
programme.desc: Fran helps Brighton when his failing science grades force Maxwell to threaten him with military school.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Cradle Robbers
programme.desc: Fran (Fran Drescher) chaperons Maggie on a date with an older man (Brian Bloom) and falls for the man's 25-year-old friend (Sean Kanan).

programme.title: The Nanny: The Tart With Heart (PII)
programme.desc: Fran decides to date a blind man after she is convinced by C.C. that men admire her only for her looks.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Rosie Show
programme.desc: Fran lands a weekly segment on a popular talk show, causing problems in her relationship with Maxwell.

programme.title: The Nanny: Freida Needa Man
programme.desc: Fran (Fran Drescher) plays matchmaker to expedite the departure of her recently evicted Aunt Frieda (Lainie Kazan). Guest star: Donald O'Connor.

programme.title: The Nanny: Me and Mrs.Joan
programme.desc: Fran's attempt to reunite Maxwell with his estranged father and stepmother goes awry when the Fines get a bad tip.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Taxman Cometh
programme.desc: Jay Leno (guest starring as himself) unwittingly saves Fran (Fran Drescher) from going to jail after she and Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy) appeal her tax audit. Guest star: Rich Little.

programme.title: The Nanny: An Affair to Dismember
programme.desc: Nigel Sheffield (Harry Van Gorkum), rather than Maxwell, pops the question to Fran (Fran Drescher), who agrees to join him in London. Guest star: Shirley Jones.

programme.title: The Nanny: Tattoo
programme.desc: Maxwell (Charles Shaughnessy) wants to see Fran's (Fran Drescher) concealed tattoo, while her mother (Renee Taylor) suggests that Dr. Roberts (John Astin) remove it.

programme.title: The Nanny: The Car Show
programme.desc: Fran (Fran Drescher) enters a beauty contest to win a car, but the celebrity judge (Miss America Tara Holland) is not impressed with her. Roslyn Kind also guest stars.

programme.title: The Nanny: Hurricane Fran
programme.desc: Fran misses the Sheffield estate when she takes Val on a Caribbean vacation in the middle of hurricane season.

programme.title: The Nanny: Danny's Dead and Who's...
programme.desc: Fran (Fran Drescher) encourages the widow (Pamela Lee) of her former fiance to begin dating again. With Charles Shaughnessy.

programme.title: The Nanny: Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: The man of Fran's (Fran Drescher) dreams, a handsome, young doctor, turns out to be her first cousin (Jon Stewart).

programme.title: The Nanny: The Fifth Wheel
programme.desc: Fran (Fran Drescher) becomes a burden to her dating friends when her therapist (Spalding Gray) convinces her to stop dating.

programme.title: The Nanny: Samson, He Denied Her
programme.desc: A judge finds it difficult to control Fran when she hears the testimony of a housekeeper against her employer.

programme.title: Married With Children: Old Insurance Dodge
programme.desc: Al tries to scam the insurance company when the Dodge is stolen.

programme.title: Married With Children: Wedding Repercussions
programme.desc: Bud's cousin shows up angry after finding out that someone slept with his wife before their wedding...not knowing that that person is Bud.

programme.title: Married With Children: The Proposition
programme.desc: Al's old girlfriend wants to buy Al from Peggy for $500,000.

programme.title: Married With Children: A Tisket, a Tasket, Can Peg Make a Basket?

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Diamond State BBQ
programme.desc: The competition heats up in the northeast, even as temperatures fall at the Diamond State BBQ Championship in Dover, DE. Harry's former teammate, Gary, competes on his own and Tuffy does Myron a favor, which could end up hurting his own chances.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Johnny Trigg's Shootout
programme.desc: It's a true Texas showdown when the Godfather of Ribs, Johnny Trigg, challenges his closest friends and fiercest rivals to compete in an all-rib Shootout. For the first time ever, the cookers watch the judges reactions, both good and shockingly bad.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: The Big Pig Jig
programme.desc: Pitmasters are going hog wild at the oldest BBQ event in Georgia - the Big Pig Jig. Myron's on his home turf defending his title as self-proclaimed king of hog while Tuffy faces a double challenge as he attempts his first whole hog on a new pit.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Not A Moment To Spare
programme.desc: Four BBQ Pitmasters face off with a BBQ favorite - spare ribs. But first, they face a prehistoric challenge that could extinct them from the competition and their chance at $5,000 and an invitation to the finale for the $100,000 grand prize.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Butt Out!
programme.desc: Four of America's top Pitmasters go head to head to prove their pork butt is the best. But when things get fishy, one team is extinguished from the competition as the rest vie for $5,000 and an invitation to the finale for the $100,000 grand prize.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Fowl Play

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Roasted Development
programme.desc: Four of America's top Pitmasters face the hottest challenge yet and someone's going to ROAST! With one Pitmaster headed into an ambulance, the rest compete for $5,000 and an invitation into the finale for the biggest prize in BBQ - $100,000.

programme.title: BBQ Pitmasters: Up In Smoke!
programme.desc: Four of America's top Pitmasters are challenged to one of the toughest low & slow meats - brisket. While the pits are low and slow, tempers flare as these teams vie for $5,000 and an invitation into the finale for the biggest prize in BBQ - $100,000.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1996 Chevrolet Caprice

programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old hatchback into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, JT gets his 1988 Honda Civic pimped with Lamborghini doors and Ferrari style seats.
