programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. Xzibit gets a surprise when he discovers a previous tenant living inside a neglected 1976 Pacer.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 2003 Toyota Corolla
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. Xzibit takes a 2003 Corolla that has been in a bad accident and turns it into a musician's dream.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Chevrolet C10
programme.desc: Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, Xzibit takes an '86 Chevy Pickup and gives a new meaning to "dumps like a truck"!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Mini Van
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, X and the boys turn a dried up mini-van into an oasis on wheels.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1968 Chevrolet Chevelle Convertible
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, X restores the magic of a classic 68 Chevelle Malibu convertible.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1989 Ford Taurus
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, X blows the doors off an 89 Ford Taurus in a whole new way.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1986 Buick Century
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. X turns someone's world upside down when he installs the world's largest subwoofer into their car.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: 1957 Chevrolet Panel Truck
programme.desc: Xzibit turns tired old cars into fully loaded cruisin' machines. X turns a '57 Panel truck into an Italian Villa on wheels using a wall of monitors and marble floors.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Malibu
programme.desc: Sun-beaten and rusted out, Xzibit and the guys go where no one has gone before with Calvin's Chevy Malibu. Watch them turn this UFO believer's car into a UDO: Unidentified Driving Object!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: VW Thing
programme.desc: The '73 Volkswagen Thing is Erin's passion. She's a groomer for small animals but she bought 'The Thing' for $5,000 by selling 3 pigs. Only Xzibit and the guys can help her now.

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Galant
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. Watch as Xzibit creates poetry in motion for a '94 Mitsubishi Galant and its owner!

programme.title: Pimp My Ride: Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Pimp Master of Ceremonies Xzibit turns tired old hatchbacks into fully loaded cruisin' machines. In this episode, Xzibit turns a liquidated Ford ice cream truck into a frozen asset.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Undercover
programme.desc: An undercover job becomes a personal investment when Chris falls for the money launderer she's trying to expose. Meanwhile, Cory's ex makes her life difficult.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Genuine Heroes
programme.desc: Victor is ready and willing when a TV hostess chooses him as a bodyguard. T.C. and Chris rush to stop a wayward bounty hunter from claiming his prey.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Cranked Up
programme.desc: While competing in an endurance race in the mountains, the crew crosses paths with a group of drug dealers.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: Palermo tries to outrun his past when his crooked ex-partner shows up, looking to even the score with the man who ruined his career and his life.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Wheels of Fire
programme.desc: A trio of women use their martial arts skills to attack men. A personal problem irks T.C., who's not crazy about his latest assignment. Jessie asks Victor for sex advice.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Outlaw Extreme
programme.desc: Family ties bind as Palermo's daughter gets in over her head with a pair of extreme adventurists. Meanwhile, Victor is visited by his meddlesome mother.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: One Kiss Goodbye
programme.desc: Cory's job — and heart — are on the line when she helps an amnesiac uncover his connection to a murder. T.C. breaks it off with Sandy when she leaves town for college.

programme.title: Pacific Blue: Full Moon
programme.desc: Careers are at stake when T.C. and Chris make a love connection during a stakeout. Meanwhile, a disapproving Palermo must explain his own link to a Hollywood madam.

programme.title: Helix: Dans L'Ombre
programme.desc: Alan and Peter capture the assassin Scythe and demand to know the whereabouts of Julia’s mother. Concerns that the virus is in Ilaria’s possession again forces Alan and the team off the base to search the world in order to retrieve it.

programme.title: Helix: San Jose
programme.desc: Peter Farragut, Sarah Jordan and Dr. Kyle Sommer go to a mysterious island to investigate an unknown pathogen that killed everyone, except Leila, aboard the Mist of Avalon.

programme.title: Helix: Reunion
programme.desc: Jordan discovers Alan, Peter's brother, is a member of Brother Michael's cult, but despite Alan's warnings she and Peter refuse to leave the Abbey and continue to investigate how Soren became infected.

programme.title: A Century of Science Fiction: Power of the Mind
programme.desc: This fascinating chapter takes a look at such mental manifestations as ESP, mind control, and telekinesis.

programme.title: A Century of Science Fiction: Queens of Sci-Fi
programme.desc: Witness Zsa-Zsa Gabor as the Queen of Outer Space, among many, many other royal sci-fi sisters.

programme.title: A Century of Science Fiction: Robots
programme.desc: From the sexy Art Deco robot in Metropolis to the low-budget gorilla-with-a-space-helmet robot in Robot Monster and on to R2D2 and C3PO, audiences have been fascinated by mechanical men and women for ages.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Through Your Eyes
programme.desc: Zo'or kidnaps a comatose policeman in order to use the man's body as a 'vessel' in a consciousness transfer experiment that will allow him to 'test' the human survival instinct and cause havoc on Earth.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Time Bomb
programme.desc: While examining Ma'el's ship, Liam and Renee find a chamber and in it are some life pods and the persons are all dead except for one.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: The Fields
programme.desc: Liam investigates a mission run by the Church of the Companions when a friend of his disappears. Sandoval and the Taelons are concerned about "the fields" where something vital to the Taelons' survival is harvested.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Apparition
programme.desc: Liam investigates the suspicious death of a banker, which he saw in a dream. It seems to be an exiled Taelon spirit that is contacting him. Da'an berates Zo'or for his money and power hungry attitude.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Mochi
programme.desc: How will Challenger Toshiyuki Nakagawa try to use mochi, the traditional Japanese ingredient, against Iron Chef Chen? It's a ricey race to the finish line in this battle of mochi.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Turnip
programme.desc: Challenger Kouji Yamada left the prestigious Tokyo University for a life as a chef. How will he battle it out with Iron Chef Sakai while his mentor looks on?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Chinese Cabbage
programme.desc: Hisao Odachi, the founder of the relatively unknown field of yakuzen cooking, comes to Kitchen Stadium. What kind of dishes will he make in his showdown with Iron Chef Chen?

programme.title: Iron Chef: Chocolate Apple
programme.desc: In a dessert battle suited for Valentine's Day, see who reigns supreme when Fuyuko Kondo, the 4th female challenger, takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Soy Bean
programme.desc: Kandagawa brings another female challenger, Yoshie Tobe, into the ring against Iron Chef Chen. It's a soybean battle of the sexes.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Matsuba Crab
programme.desc: Masuo Suzuki, a challenger from Kihachi, a restaurant Iron Chef Michiba used to go to for ideas, comes into Kitchen Stadium to issue a matsuba crab challenge.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Taro Potato
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen takes on Challenger Kunihiko Hashimoto, an authority on Japanese cuisine and beloved student of well-known Japanese chefs, for a taro potato fight to the finish.

programme.title: Iron Chef: Asparagus
programme.desc: Sakai faces a challenger known as 'Mr. Gourmet.' Komine is a world-class vegetable chef who feels right at home with the secret ingredient.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men
programme.desc: While searching for a place known as Sharewood Village, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool find themselves lost in Sharewood Forest; as Mario, Luigi and Princess Toadstool stand nearby, Toad begins to glance at his map to Sharewood Village
programme.sub-title: Hooded Robin and his Mario Men

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Toad Warriors
programme.desc: In the badlands of Car Land, Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad are riding in a brown convertible car, planning on rendezvousing with several Mushroom rebels.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Pied Koopa
programme.desc: In Pasta Land, King Koopa uses a magical flute to lure all of the local Mushroom children away from the town, and leads them to his nearby castle.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bad Rap
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have arrived in Rap Land, because King Koopa had kidnapped Rap Land's king, and is attempting to take everyone's money by playing an eerie theme throughout the land.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of StealthBot aircraft.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic and Sally
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a robotisized Sally clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Ultra Sonic
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his robotisizer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic and the Secret Scrolls
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Super Sonic
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic Racer
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Hooked on Sonics
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Harmonic Sonic
programme.desc: When Robotnik launches a spyorb that will uncover the Freedom Fighter's Knothole location, Sonic and Robot launch themselves up to the orbiting spy sphere aboard a homemade rocket powered by Robotnik's discarded booster engine.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic's Nightmare
programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigiblelike craft being transported by land vehicles.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Warp Sonic
programme.desc: When Sonic and The Freedom Fighters take out Robotnik's main computer, they're trapped by SwatBots in an underground tunnel, only to be rescued by a handsome teenager named Griff.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sub-Sonic
programme.desc: Robotnik severely upsets the ecosystem above and below the surface, when he sends explosive, Robotnik snake probes drilling deep under ground in search of oil lakes.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog: Sonic Past Cool
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole a baby TerraPod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: Ellie Butler
programme.desc: Britain’s Darkest Taboos tells the stories of some of the most shocking and disturbing crimes within families and relationships. Every family’s worst nightmares are relived and re-told in unflinching detail by those left behind.

programme.title: Britain's Darkest Taboos: My Son In Law Burnt My Family To Death - Melissa Crook
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 10, 2011, Danai Muhammadi and an accomplice used a garden spray to start a blaze that killed his estranged wife Melissa Crook, his father-in-law Mark Crook and his own baby, 15-month-old Noah Crook.
programme.sub-title: My Son In Law Burnt My Family To Death - Melissa Crook

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: John Sweeney
programme.desc: John Sweeney brutally murdered two of his girlfriends, dismembered their bodies and dumped them in canals. In a macabre twist, he hid clues in his abstract paintings, and five other girlfriends of his are currently still missing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Gemma McCluskie
programme.desc: The harrowing story of EastEnders actress Gemma McCluskie, who was murdered by her older brother in the flat they shared in east London in 2012.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 6
programme.desc: Today Dr. Berney discusses CPR and your pet; what rats are like as pets; and tips regarding adopting a new pet.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 7
programme.desc: Post-operative care of pets is discussed; how to pet proof your home; and what to look for on a pet food label.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 8
programme.desc: Dr. Berney shows how to tell if your bird is healthy or sick; we learn how pets can help the elderly; new chip implants are explained.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 9
programme.desc: Search and rescue dogs are one of today’s topics; also how to pick and appropriate collar for your cat.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 10
programme.desc: How do you clean your cat’s teeth? Dr. Berney shows how to set up an aquarium; and the best care for an outdoor dog.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 11
programme.desc: On this episode we meet with Hearing-ear dogs; get tips for finding a lost pet; also, administering eye medication to dogs.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 12
programme.desc: Dr. Berney discusses dysplasia in dogs; travelling with your cat; and whether or not you can mix human painkillers and animals.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 13
programme.desc: Today’s show deals with heartworm; cat litter boxes and litter; and in the clinic, Dr. Berney’s examination for a dog with a cough.

programme.title: Pet Connection: Episode 14
programme.desc: What kind of pets are mice? Dr. Berney talks about the eye problems of older dogs; and cat grooming hints.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Thailand
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Tufnell Park
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil almost come to blows when they take on the impossible – finding a flat with private parking in pricey North London for £290,000. They're helping Laura Cream, a very single-minded young lady.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Jersey
programme.desc: This week we're on Jersey hunting for a fabulous family home for the young couple Nick and Katrina. We show them the many highs and lows this Channel Island has to offer.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week we've been called in to help a lucky couple that have just scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and want to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Hackney
programme.desc: This week we're guiding two first time buyers through the property jungle that is East London. Rosie Evatt and Laura Coveney have been friends since childhood and are pooling their resources to buy their first property together.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Wicklow
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young mother achieve her dream of moving back to Ireland. Sue Wessell longs to return to the place where she grew up and has persuaded husband Chris and their two children to up sticks and relocate to the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bristol
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil come to the aid of newly qualified doctor Ian Ensum, as he takes his first steps on the property ladder.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Northampton
programme.desc: Despite a slowdown in the housing market, property is still very much headline news, and we love it! But, finding that all singing, all dancing dream home is tougher than ever!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Brighton
programme.desc: Armed with the house-hunters' requirements, laptops and a surgical link to their mobile phones, Kirstie and Phil blitz the market looking for that perfect new place.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Lincolnshire
programme.desc: With a wide range of budgets across the whole of the UK, Phil and Kirstie are challenged at every turn, and there are many!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Bath
programme.desc: This week we're back catching up with Sadie Yukon and Simon Gwillian, a picky pair who really put us through the mill.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Yorkshire
programme.desc: This week, we're back in Yorkshire catching up with lotto millionaires Roger and Lara Griffiths. Just over a year ago, this lucky pair scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and were desperate to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Episode 16
programme.desc: With the market constantly shifting, there's no such thing as a "simple search" anymore. Our dynamic duo will have to work harder than ever before to make sure they come up with the goods.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Glasgow
programme.desc: In Glasgow is first time buyer project manager and property obsessive Adam. With a budget of £250,000, he's looked at 500 properties in the 9 months!

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: It Wouldn't Hurt Them to Give Us a Raise
programme.desc: Rob tries to get a raise for Buddy and Sally from Alan Brady's tight-fisted accountant.
programme.sub-title: It Wouldn't Hurt Them to Give Us a Raise

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Death of the Party
programme.desc: Rob struggles to hide his flu symptoms at a family party rather than admit Laura was right to warn him about golfing in damp conditions.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: My Two Showoffs and Me
programme.desc: Mel wants a magazine reporter to watch the writers at work, but Rob thinks they'll all end up performing for the reporter instead of getting anything done.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Stretch Petrie vs. Kid Schenk
programme.desc: Rob is once again forced to thwart another scheme of his old but manipulative friend, Neil Schenk.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Brother, Can You Spare $2500?
programme.desc: Rob receives a ransom demand of $2,500 for his lost television script.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Impractical Joke
programme.desc: Rob resorts to psychological warfare to get even with a practical joker.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Stacey Petrie: Part I
programme.desc: Fresh out of the Army, Stacey Petrie arrives to open his nightclub and marry his fiancée whom he's never met.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Stacey Petrie: Part II
programme.desc: Stacey Petrie tries to save his new business from closing and his romance from ending.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Boy #1, Boy #2
programme.desc: Millie and Laura become two terrible stage-mothers when Rob agrees to hire Ritchie and Freddie for a commercial.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Redcoats Are Coming
programme.desc: Rob agrees to have a popular British singing duo spend the night at his home when they appear on 'The Alan Brady Show.'

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: The Case of the Pillow
programme.desc: Rob takes a shady salesman to court for selling Laura smelly feather pillows.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Young Man with a Shoehorn
programme.desc: Buddy and Rob run a shoe store they've invested in after chasing off its only full-time salesman.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show: Girls Will Be Boys
programme.desc: Rob and Laura are in a quandary over how Ritchie can protect himself from a girl who's been persistently beating him up at school.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Starter
programme.desc: This week, the spotlight is on the chefs from Wales – Richard Davies, Aled Williams and James Sommerin. Today they kick things off with their starters, but which one is going to be first off the blocks? Former champion Stephen Terry will decide.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Fish
programme.desc: Today the chefs from Wales – Richard Davies, James Sommerin and Aled Williams - pull out all the stops with their fish dishes: poached lobster with confit potatoes, sea bass with brown crab, and sea trout with apple, beetroot and smoked mussels.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Wales Judging

programme.desc: Its decision time on Great British Menu for the chefs from the North East. One chef left the competition yesterday and only two remain, as they cook their entire menus for the Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton.

programme.desc: While visiting their future burial plots, Appa and Umma make an unfortunate discovery. A faux fight between Jung and Kimchee is caught on video.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Sneak Attack
programme.desc: Appa and Umma learn that selling illegal face cream has a downside. Janet adopts an alternate identity to get into a film festival.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Silent Auction
programme.desc: In hopes of claiming a winning lotto ticket, Janet searches for a legal loophole. Jung has a tough talk with Shannon. Umma covets a fancy coat.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New TV
programme.desc: Kimchee tries to keep his new girlfriend from meeting Jung. Janet speaks her mind in class. Appa scores a new TV.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Janet's Boyfriend
programme.desc: Janet struggles to keep her parents from learning about her relationship with Raj. Meanwhile, Jung and Kimchee plan a party.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Good Neighbours
programme.desc: Kim's Convenience gets a noisy new neighbor. Jung becomes smitten with a new co-worker. Gerald's new girlfriend rubs Janet the wrong way.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appa's First Text
programme.desc: Appa inherits his daughter's old smartphone. Umma finds a stray dog in the store. Janet and Kimchee bond over dim sum.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Handy Graduation
programme.desc: At a party to celebrate getting his GED, Jung can't ignore his feelings for Shannon. Meanwhile, Janet grows tired of standing in her brother's shadow.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: New Appa-liance
programme.desc: Appa's got a plan to get a new appliance for less, Jung looks to mend old fences and Janet searches for a way to differentiate herself online.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Cutie Pie
programme.desc: Appa worries Umma will be jealous of a flirty online review. Jung returns to his old stomping grounds. Gerald's girlfriend ruffles Janet's feathers.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Open Kimunication
programme.desc: Appa and Umma take their bickering to a new level. Janet crosses paths with a photography idol. Shannon's boyfriend asks Jung for a favor.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thy Neighbour's Wifi
programme.desc: Appa has a solution for spotty Wi-Fi: use the neighbor's. Jung has eyes for Shannon's friend. Umma and Pastor Nina ask Janet to do a church reading.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Army Spoon
programme.desc: Gerald photographs Appa and his spoon for an exhibit. Janet's apology for a restaurant faux pas doesn't go well. Umma receives an alarming call.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Kim Cup
programme.desc: An old ping-pong table rekindles a rivalry between Appa and Jung. Umma sets out to bond with Janet but finds Chelsea to be more receptive.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanoon Delight
programme.desc: Appa's quest to retrieve his drill from Janet leads to an amorous encounter with Umma. Jung gives Kimchee unsolicited advice and plenty of it.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: To Him It May Concern
programme.desc: Following Appa's spelling error, Umma becomes the store sign maker. Kimchee's mom visits and Janet lands an internship for Gerald.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Mega Cities
programme.desc: Mega Cities provide a bustling home to populations of over 10 million. Travel from the high-density living of Shanghai and Bangkok to the sprawling cities of Delhi and Mexico City, each the backdrop for dynamic cultures.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Capital Cities
programme.desc: With visionaries, politicians, and activists, these metropolises are defined as the official seats of government. Dublin, Washington, and Taipei share broad avenues, museums, and monuments, but are as varied as the countries they represent.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Port Cities
programme.desc: Some of the most stunning cities are port cities - Sydney, Rio, Cape Town - and are also some of the most culturally diverse and vibrant. The great maritime cities of the world bridge countries and continents and unite the global community.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Ancient Cities
programme.desc: In Ancient Cities, we journey to these ancestors of influence such as Luang Prabang, Vienna, and Istanbul where religious and cultural centers have shaped the ways in which we view the world around us and continue to do so in modern times.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Remote Cities
programme.desc: Brave the frontiers of the world’s most remote cities. More than distant trading posts and isolated regional hubs, cities like Alice Springs, Jaipur and even Las Vegas serve as gateways to the wild places of the Earth.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Jungle Animals
programme.desc: Encounter gorillas and orangutans, killer tree-dwelling pythons, delightful monkeys, awe-inspiring tigers, and millions of land-dwelling red crabs in Australia, the islands of Southeast Asia, Africa, and the Amazon.

programme.title: World's Greatest: Wetland Animals
programme.desc: Wetland Animals dives into the swamps, rivers, and flood plains of the Everglades, Botswana’s Okavango Delta, Kakadu National Park in Australia, and the Amazon to see deadly crocodiles, piranhas, hippopotamus, flamingo, manatee, and platypus.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Brother Binky, Parts I&II
programme.desc: Binky's family has decided to adopt a little girl from China. The thought of a baby sister makes Binky happy, until he realized there are some changes in store. It’s a lot harder than he thought, but it has its rewards too.

programme.title: Arthur: Is That Kosher/Never Never Never
programme.desc: Francine's convinced that she can fast on Yom Kippur, but what about Arthur’s pizza party? D.W learns that giving gifts isn't the only way of showing you care. Featuring the voice of Joan Rivers.

programme.title: Arthur: Room to Ride/The Frensky Family Fiasco
programme.desc: With Lance Armstrong’s support, Binky and his friends take to the streets to convince residents to vote for new bike safety lanes. Francine wants the Frenskys to be closer, but a weekly Family Night turns out to be harder than expected.
programme.sub-title: Room to Ride/The Frensky Family Fiasco

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry
programme.desc: D.W. is panicked when a virus ruins the Read family computer. Who will take care of her virtual pet? Arthur and D.W. are thrilled when Grandma Thora lets them turn her attic into a clubhouse. But will a bat threaten their new play space?
programme.sub-title: D.W.'S Stray Netkitin/Bats in the Belfry

programme.title: Arthur: For the Birds/Ungifted
programme.desc: Brain dreams of being the first to spot a rare bird species called the green-tailed grebe, making him famous. Arthur and Buster's friendship is put to the test when Arthur gives away a present that Buster had given him for his birthday.

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.
programme.sub-title: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot

programme.title: Arthur: The Cherry Tree/Matchmaker Matchbreaker
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Bouncy Castle at her party, but when her favorite cherry tree is cut down to make room for it, she starts to have regrets. Francine and Muffy scheme to set up their older siblings Chip and Catherine, but plans go awry.

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One
programme.desc: Brain is always taking the fun out of Fern's storytelling by correcting her facts, but things gets out of hand when Fern tricks him with a fake story! Buster is always asking for favors. Will he learn the real meaning of friendship?
programme.sub-title: War of the Worms/I Owe You One

programme.title: Arthur: The Blackout/Mei Lin Takes a Stand
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Elwood City, and a total blackout leaves its residents without electricity! Will Arthur and DW survive without AC and TV? Binky's baby sister Mei-Lin isn't keen on learning to walk and would rather stick to crawling.
programme.sub-title: The Blackout/Mei Lin Takes a Stand

programme.title: Arthur: Home Sweet Home/Do You Believe in Magic
programme.desc: It’s time to celebrate summer! Join Arthur as he takes a family vacation and visits Grandpa Dave’s farm. Then, Arthur, D.W. and Buster spend a few days at the beach where they discover the simple joys of building sandcastles!
programme.sub-title: Home Sweet Home/Do You Believe in Magic

programme.title: Arthur: The Perfect Game/D.W.'s Furry Freakout
programme.desc: Francine is excited about a school project, but she's so obsessed with making it perfect that she can't seem to get anything done at all. When D.W. finds a stray kitten, it soon turns out to be a lot more than D.W. can handle.

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool
programme.desc: When shy George wonders if any of his friends notice him, he decides he won’t speak to anyone until they do! Fern volunteers to help an elderly neighbor with his household chores, and then discovers his past life as a Kung Fu celebrity.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Numbers Nightmare/Brain Gets Hooked
programme.desc: When the gang discovers a list of their class rankings in Principal Haney's office, they are all taken for a surprise. Brain gets hooked on the latest tween reality show and then starts to ignore his friends and his schoolwork.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Harold & Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful fellow jock named Armani. Although they live in the same area, they've never met. Nev is joined by Angel Haze to help Harold get his perfect girl. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Daisy & Marcus
programme.desc: Daisy met Marcus on Instagram and he instantly stole her heart. But Marcus won't speak to Daisy on the phone, let alone meet her in person, so Nev and Tyler try to arrange a face to face. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Chitara & Priscilla
programme.desc: Chitara took a big leap and came out to her family when she met Priscilla online, but Priscilla ended their relationship unexpectedly. Now Chitara is determined to find out what happened. (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Felipe & Jasmine
programme.desc: Single father Felipe is ready to settle down with Jasmine. However, the two have been talking online for eight months and have never met. Max returns and joins Nev to investigate. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Whitney & Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on a LGBT website four years ago and is head-over-heels in love. Brenell refuses to video chat with her, and Whitney is desperate to know why. Nev and Max investigate. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Jamey and Ari
programme.desc: Jamey fell for Ari online, and he will do anything to meet her, but she will only do it on TV! Nev and Max help Ari share her story, and she hopes Jamey will accept her as she is. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show Daytime: Blaire & Markie
programme.desc: When Blaire's Instagram lover Markie broke her heart, she moved on. But now Markie is back and wants to meet. Blaire needs Nev and Max's help to make it happen and reveal Markie's secret. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Over the Edge
programme.desc: A report on the investigation into the 2009 disappearance of Dawn Viens, and why her husband, California chef David Viens, jumped off a cliff when he became a suspect in her disappearance.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Pain and Gain
programme.desc: A report about the crimes of the Sun Gym gang, a group of Miami, Florida drifters, petty thieves, and bodybuilders who kidnapped and killed wealthy people to fuel their lifestyle.

programme.title: 48 Hours: AKA Rockefeller
programme.desc: Authorities suspect a con man who has used many different identities may be a murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ambushed
programme.desc: A man helps a new detective figure out who murdered his father.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Devil's Twin
programme.desc: Identical twin brothers suspected of committing a murder after studying a crime show on TV.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Perfect Family
programme.desc: A young man is on trial for the murder of his mother.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The War in Chicago
programme.desc: The street violence, gang activity and drug trafficking in Chicago.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Relentless
programme.desc: A woman wages a psychological war against the person she believes killed her daughter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Beantown Bidders
programme.desc: 1800s blackpowder whaling harpoon; 1940s Schwinn Town & Country tandem bicycle; a vintage American flag collection that could be worth thousands.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Harley Davidson V-twin EVO engine and revolutionary 1958 dual-suspension swingarm frame; '80s Ms. Pac-Man arcade machine; rare Air Jordan vintage shoe collection in mint condition.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Best Christmas Party Ever
programme.desc: Jennie Stanton (Torrey DeVitto) throws the best Christmas parties every year for her company, Petra's Parties.

programme.title: A Christmoose Story
programme.desc: A large moose crashes through the roof of young Max's garage! A moose who talks! A moose who claims to work for Santa!

programme.title: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Maire prays that her husband find the strength to let go of their 9 year marriage. Billy is asking that his wife receive the strength and wisdom to hold on. A 8-year-old runaway from heaven takes it upon herself to rekindle the romance that slipped away.

programme.title: An American Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A retelling of Charles Dickens' beloved A Christmas Carol in which Henry Winkler is a heartless finance company president in Depression era New England.

programme.title: Finding Mrs. Claus
programme.desc: When Mrs. Claus (Mira Sorvino) feels neglected by her less than attentive husband (Will Sasso), she goes to Las Vegas to help a little girl with her Christmas wish.

programme.title: Sarah's House: Exterior/finale
programme.desc: After seeing how the farm’s exterior has come together, Sarah finally learns how much value her hard work has added to the once modest farmhouse...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Find And Buy
programme.desc: Sarah Richardson takes to the suburbs. Her goal: to show you how to make design choices in a new build home to end up with a more personalized and desirable place to live...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Living Room
programme.desc: In the developer’s original plans the living room in this large suburban home was chopped into two small rooms. A floorplan tweak results in one larger, formal entertaining space scaled to the size of this home...

programme.title: Sarah's House: First Impressions
programme.desc: First impressions mean everything, and Sarah’s House does not disappoint. Sarah Richardson’s goal is to create style, sophistication and impact in an entryway, mudroom and powder room that tease expectations to the rest of a typical suburban home...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Kitchen
programme.desc: Sarah Richardson sets out to create a dramatic kitchen that works in both family and formal settings. To do this Sarah and design sidekick Tommy Smythe must devote a larger than anticipated chunk of their upgrade budget to the cause...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Family Room
programme.desc: The challenge? Create a family room that is comfortable, beautiful and neutral – the inspiration being caffe latte...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Dining Room
programme.desc: Colour, pattern, texture and lighting all help to make what is often an orphan room feel connected to the rest of a typical home. Sarah Richardson adds drama to the space with among other touches crown moulding, chair rail and grasscloth wallpaper...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Girls' Bedroom
programme.desc: It’s a lesson in creating a kids’ room that has style and can grow with the child. Sarah Richardson and design sidekick Tommy Smythe use a fun polka dot fabric as jumping off point for a space that is light, bright and inspiring...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Craft Room
programme.desc: Sarah Richardson carves a dedicated craft room from the blank canvas of bedrooms in this new build suburban home. Sarah’s design vision of “stylized lab” is molded from a space that can easily revert to a bedroom if the need arises...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Boy's Bedroom
programme.desc: Greys and blacks find their home in a blank canvas boy’s bedroom. Sarah Richardson kicks off the design with a zigzag fabric that inspires the rest of the finds – an Edison bulb light...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Master Bedroom
programme.desc: Sarah Richardson introduces romance to this large, builder beige master bedroom. Sarah kicks it all off with botanical inspired fabrics and prints, fresh crisp paint colours and wallpaper on a feature wall. A vintage desk...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Master Ensuite
programme.desc: The oversized master ensuite in this new build suburban house is proof that you can have too much of a good thing...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Rec Room
programme.desc: An all purpose room the entire family can enjoy. Sarah Richardson invested a serious amount of her upgrade on a basement walkout to the backyard, and ups and ante by combining a series of small boxy rooms into one multi-purpose destination...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Curb Appeal, Finale
programme.desc: Most new build homes come with little more than a patch of grass and struggling sapling. Sarah Richardson revises the front-scape of the custom suburban home with plantings and accessories that convey a “been there all along” appeal...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Find And Buy
programme.desc: Sarah jumps onto a hot real estate market to show you how to buy a fixer-upper and make it the house you want right away. The ultimate renovator’s dream is elusive – good bones, the right price and location are everything...

programme.title: Sarah's House: Backyard
programme.desc: Overgrown and unloved, no one can remember when Sarah’s backyard has seen better days. Landscapers and muscle work hand in hand to resurrect this hardscrabble plot into a chic low-maintenance space for year-round enjoyment. Increased privacy...

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Cut Out
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade recovers at Briana's house, but has to make a decision about her family. Kail juggles three different co-parenting relationships. (S10, ep30)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: On The Shoulders Of Giants
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Ashley and Bar grapple racist backlash. Kloie's behaviour wedges a divide between Jade and Sean. Leah meets her doctor in hopes of getting answers about a lump. (S10, ep31)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Backslide
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Jade's career is moving forward, but her relationship with Sean begins to slip. While Ashley prepares to receive her degree, Bar's schoolwork hits a road block. (S10, ep32)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Off The Leash
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Kail faces a court battle with Chris. Bar's DUI resurfaces and threatens to ruin Ashley's graduation party. Leah finds out if she needs surgery on her tumour. (S10, ep33)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: Chelsea, Leah, Kail, Briana, and Jade sit down to unpack this season. Chelsea reveals to the other mums why she is leaving the show while Leah's ex-husbands address their contentious relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Dr. Drew and Nessa host as Briana returns after her blowup with Devoin and Kailyn speaks about her personal growth. Chelsea and Cole get emotional as they look back at Chelsea's incredible journey.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Briana's Family Secret
programme.desc: When Briana DeJesus finds out she has a secret teenage brother, her world is turned upside down. Will Briana be able to create a bond with her brother or will her family implode in the process?

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 1
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Leah and Kail reflect on their growth over the last ten years while Jade and Briana discuss their traumatic experience in Miami. (S10, ep34)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: In Teen Mom 2 Uncut, Leah and her daughters discuss their journey. Jade makes boundaries with her mum. Ashley and Bar break down how they overcome struggles and Tea gushes about Holly. (S10, ep35)

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kianna
programme.desc: With an immature boyfriend and a distant mum, Kianna wants more stability for her baby and considers adoption. When no one supports her decision, she must figure out how to be a good parent.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: Taylor's mum wants her to choose adoption, but Taylor and her boyfriend Nathan feel that they can overcome the challenges of being teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Allie
programme.desc: A Jersey girl is stuck in Texas after moving in with her boyfriend's dysfunctional family, Allie needs to decide whether to raise her baby in an unstable environment or without a dad.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Reunion
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts an emotional finale as ten teen mothers share a stage to come together with their boyfriends and parents and talk about the issues they face.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the exclusive moments we never saw with the girls from season 3 of 16 And Pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: An in-depth look at everything that's happened since the cameras stopped rolling on the girls from the first two seasons of 16 and Pregnant.
